name: Anna Bukowski, tinaforminnesota.com
subject: This is it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Right now is when Republicans and dark money super PACs are making their decisions. | [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4bee9/c1f7015/6bf89ce5/1142e8bd/3386870744/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june_eoq?refcode=rtw_20180628PM_em-A") Team -- this is it. Just two days until our end-of-quarter deadline. After this deadline, our numbers will be public and everyone will know how strong or how weak this team is.**I 'm about to give Tina an update on how close we are to our $50,000 goal and I want to make sure she knows we're strong -- can she count on you to chip in right now?** **[Chip in right away to help us meet our goal before our FEC deadline on Saturday and show everyone that we're going to keep this Senate seat blue in 2018.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4bee9/c1f7015/6bf89ce5/1142e8bd/3386870744/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june_eoq?refcode=rtw_20180628PM_em-A")** Right now is when Republicans and dark money super PACs are making their decisions on where to spend their money. If they see that we are strong and that progressives like you are ready to respond, they will know that this U.S. Senate seat cannot be bought. And we will be able to hire more staff, expand our organizing, and reach voters in every corner of the state. If we miss our goals, even by a small margin, they will think that we are weak and attack us on the airwaves and try to buy this seat. And we will be forced to cut back on our budget. That's why this deadline matters, and why I want to tell Tina we're ready to blow past this goal. **[Friend, will you rush in a donation towards our $50,000 end-of-quarter goal? Every dollar will make a difference and send the message we're keeping Minnesota blue in 2018.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4bee9/c1f7015/6bf89ce5/1142e8bd/3386870744/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june_eoq?refcode=rtw_20180628PM_em-A")** Thanks! Let's do this. Anna Bukowski
Digital Director | **Proud progressive. A fierce advocate for Minnesota. U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for a seat that CNN's calling "ground zero in the 2018 midterms." To keep this seat blue, she needs your help. ** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4bee9/c1f7015/6bf89ce5/1142e8be/3386870744/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june_eoq?refcode=rtw_20180628PM_em-A-biobox&amount=25")

name: Bob Casey
subject: Our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e61b2/51dbcc2a/4c92ef9/3a4fc94/376259669/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")

Well, team, we're in for a hell of a fight.

Justice Kennedy's retirement has enormous implications for this election, but also for our democracy, and who it's going to serve. We deserve a justice who will answer to the Constitution and do right by the American people, not someone who lifts up corporations and only the wealthiest Americans. With the future of voting rights, LGBT rights, the Affordable Care Act and labor rights on the line, what happens next will have effects for generations, so we need to act quickly and decisively.

**_[If President Trump nominates a judge from his far-right, corporate list, we're likely headed for a partisan battle. I fully expect to be attacked by the far-right, the Republican establishment and special interests, so it's never been more important to invest $5 or whatever you can in my campaign.](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180628_fr3_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

We cannot afford to underestimate how hard Washington Republicans will work to elect a Senate who will confirm their chosen justice. President Trump has a list of conservative ideologues he would love to see on the bench -- judges who could do enormous amounts of harm if given a lifetime appointment to the highest court in the land.

**Our democracy as we know it is on the line. As the Senate vets the next Supreme Court justice, I'm going to fight for our American values of fairness, justice and equality with both fists up, and I will be attacked for it. Help me fight back so I can keep fighting for you.**

Here's the best link: **_[secure.bobcasey.com/donate](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180628_fr3_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thank you,

Bob

| Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc.
---
PO Box 58746, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 19102

Contributions or gifts to Bob Casey for Senate are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**

Bob Casey for Senate appreciates any feedback you might have. [Click here](mailto:info@bobcasey.com?Subject=Feedback) to contact Bob Casey for Senate with any questions, concerns, or ideas. Want to stay updated on the campaign through social media? You can like Bob Casey for Senate on [Facebook](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e61b2/51dbcc2a/4c92ef9/3a4fc90/376259669/VEsA/ "https://www.facebook.com/BobCaseyJr/") or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e61b2/51dbcc2a/4c92ef9/3a4fc91/376259669/VEsB/ "https://twitter.com/Bob_Casey") or [Instagram](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e61b2/51dbcc2a/4c92ef9/3a4fc92/376259669/VEsO/ "https://www.instagram.com/bobcaseyjr/"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e61b2/51dbcc2a/4c92ef9/3a4fc93/376259669/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") from Bob Casey for Senate emails.

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Why the Koch brothers are scared:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | On Saturday, I will face the most critical Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline of my Senate reelection campaign yet.

We've been forced to reevaluate our entire budget since hearing that the Koch brothers are running ads against me! Read more below on why the Koch brothers are coming after me. Or, if you've heard enough:

**_[Help me reach our new fundraising goal before we must publicly report our numbers>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q2?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+Help+me+reach+our+new+fundraising+goal+b&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_3_4&source=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_3_4&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_3_4")_**

* * *

Nearly every day, we face news about President Trump's scandals, his lies, and the catastrophes created by his administration. But that shouldn't detract from the progress that is being made despite his chaos.

**The public outcry this month against family separation was swift, and legislation I cosponsored helped put pressure on the Trump administration to end the heinous practice.** I am continuing to work in the Senate to reunite families and ensure government agencies are keeping children safe. Our work is far from over, and without your help I won't be able to keep fighting for our values.

**Last month, the Senate passed a resolution to save net neutrality. I can 't overstate how big a victory this is.** Many said our bill wouldn't go anywhere, but it did. We showed Americans that the Senate can still come together and address the issues that matter to millions of Americans, consumers, and small businesses. But we still have work to do to keep our internet free and open, and I need your help to do it. So please consider donating today.

[DONATE $10 NOW >>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q2?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+ask+NOW+gtgt&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_3_4&source=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_3_4&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_3_4")
And while the Trump administration makes moves to shrink our public lands, I am looking to protect them. I introduced legislation to shield the Chaco Canyon area -- a sacred place to all New Mexicans -- from drilling. Protecting Chaco from further development will ensure we don't lose its priceless history.

Some of these updates don't warrant a breaking news alert on your phone, but they are making a difference in people's lives -- and that has the Koch brothers scared.

**The Koch brothers just launched ads against me in New Mexico, and we 've been forced to change all our campaign plans in response. That means focusing more on grassroots advocacy, increasing our ad spending, and hiring more staff.**

****_[That is why I am asking for your support today. To respond to this latest news, our new budget goal is to raise an additional $50,000 before our Saturday Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline. This is my first Senate reelection race, and all this hard work and more will be undone if one of my extreme right-wing opponents defeats me this November. Will you pitch in now and help us close our new budget gap before we must publicly report our numbers?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q2?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=11+-+That+is+why+I+am+asking+for+your+support&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_3_4&source=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_3_4&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_3_4")_****

_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ ****
****[Donate $10 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q2?express_lane=true&amount=10amp;firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=12+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_3_4&source=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_3_4&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_3_4")**** ****[Donate $27 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q2?express_lane=true&amount=27&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=13+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_3_4&source=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_3_4&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_3_4")**** ******[Donate $50 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q2?express_lane=true&amount=50&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=14+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_3_4&source=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_3_4&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_3_4")****** ****[Donate another amount](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q2?amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=15+-+Donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_3_4&source=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_3_4&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_3_4")**** Thank you for your support,
Martin

** **

| PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
---

Receive this email from a friend? **[Sign up now to join Martin's team!](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b650/43d8135f/6094846b/510087fe/208358807/VEsHAw/ "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/footer-join-martins-team?source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=16+-+Sign+up+now+to+join+Martins+team&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_3_4&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_3_4")**

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a key part of our grassroots team. If you would like to unsubscribe from these emails click [here](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b650/43d8135f/6094846b/510087e1/208358807/VEsHAg/ "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=17+-+here&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_3_4&source=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_3_4&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_3_4").

Martin Heinrich for Senate
PO Box 25763
Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: StaceyAbrams.com
subject: Stacey said it best:
body:
We couldn't have said it better ourselves. Just read what Stacey had to say: |
---

| |
\----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | Friend - We couldn't have said it better ourselves -- so we won't even try. Just read what Stacey has to say about why this fundraising deadline is so important. And if you're able, make a donation at this special link: **[http://secure.staceyabrams.com/june_deadline](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaae8/34a064cc/8c6418f/70f7cff/2812378533/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwNjI4MThFT1EtMi1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-eoq?refcode=IE062818EOQ-2-full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=1+-+httpsecurestaceyabramscomjunedeadline&utm_campaign=IE062818EOQ2&source=IE062818EOQ2")** \- Team Abrams _\---original message---_ Hi - In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a donation to our campaign. I hope you'll give me a chance to explain why this request -- especially today -- is so important. I'll be blunt: Saturday is our first public fundraising deadline of the general election. After this weekend, my team will report not only how much money we've raised, but also how many supporters like you have stepped up to power our effort. And what we need to do -- for the press, our opponents, and for anyone paying attention -- is send a message that our campaign, our diverse coalition, powered by people of all backgrounds and from all communities, has the strength to win in November. So here's why I ask: **[Can I count on you to make a $3 donation to our campaign before our critical fundraising deadline? Every donation matters. I would not ask if it were not important.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaae8/34a064cc/8c6418f/70f7cfc/2812378533/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwNjI4MThFT1EtMi1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-eoq?refcode=IE062818EOQ-2-full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=2+-+Can+I+count+on+you+to+make+a+ask+donatio&utm_campaign=IE062818EOQ2&source=IE062818EOQ2")** Friends, movements to create real, lasting progress are not built overnight, and I cannot do this alone. I am so proud of the movement we're building. Our campaign is for working people, powered by working people. I am with you, because I've been there. I'm still there. And if you stand with me in this fight, we will create a state where our dreams and aspirations become real and lasting legacies. With sincerest gratitude, Stacey Abrams
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaae8/34a064cc/8c6418f/70f7cf3/2812378533/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwNjI4MThFT1EtMi1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-eoq?refcode=IE062818EOQ-2-full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=IE062818EOQ-a&source=IE062818EOQ-a")

* * *

1270 Caroline Street
Suite D120-447
Atlanta, GA 30307

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: You probably know what I'm going to ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | President Trump visited Ohio, attacked me, and supported my opponent. Vice President Pence visited Ohio, attacked me, and supported my opponent. Special interest groups have already run ads, attacking me, or supporting my opponent. **Peter, I need your help to fight back.** And yes, when I say "help," I mean a few bucks. Our first FEC deadline of the General Election is Saturday. We need to reach our $600,000 goal -- and we only have another 48 hours to get there. Our average online contribution is $26. [**If you can, rush in a contribution matching that before time runs name: Austin Petersen
subject: Can't sleep
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Hi Friend, I know it’s late but I’m having a hard time falling asleep tonight. I’ve been thinking about this big fundraising goal we have and the FEC deadline. I’ve also been thinking about just how grateful I am to have so much support. I really could not do this without your help. Campaigns are stressful. There’s a lot at stake and I am doing everything I can, day and night, to win this race. This is the best chance for the liberty movement to win in 2018. A lot of people are counting on us. We can’t let them down. %%FIRST%%, it would mean so much to me if you would make a donation tonight. [**If you open this email tonight or tomorrow morning, please consider donating $20, $50, $100 or even more here.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.anedot.com%2Faustinpetersen%2Fdonate_tb_today%3Futm_campaign%3D062818_fr%26source_code%3Demail%26email%3Ddpwillis67%40gmail.com%26first_name%3D%26last_name%3D%26street%3D%26zip%3D%26city%3D%26state%3D%26employer%3D%26occupation%3D%26phone%3D&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=062818_fr&n=1) While the campaign can be stressful sometimes, I am full of confidence and optimism. Imagine having another Rand Paul is the Senate... We could actually make some real spending cuts. Rollback the power of government agencies (or just eliminate them). We could even sponsor an Audit the Fed bill together. That’s why I am running for Senate. For liberty! [**Friend, please consider making a donation. Even if you can only donate $2, $5, or $10.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.anedot.com%2Faustinpetersen%2Fdonate_tb_today%3Futm_campaign%3D062818_fr%26source_code%3Demail%26email%3Ddpwillis67%40gmail.com%26first_name%3D%26last_name%3D%26street%3D%26zip%3D%26city%3D%26state%3D%26employer%3D%26occupation%3D%26phone%3D&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=062818_fr&n=2) If someone completes their max out donation or makes a big donation on this email I will make sure to do a liberty karaoke session on Facebook Live. [**Please send the most generous amount you can by clicking here.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.anedot.com%2Faustinpetersen%2Fdonate_tb_today%3Futm_campaign%3D062818_fr%26source_code%3Demail%26email%3Ddpwillis67%40gmail.com%26first_name%3D%26last_name%3D%26street%3D%26zip%3D%26city%3D%26state%3D%26employer%3D%26occupation%3D%26phone%3D&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=062818_fr&n=3) Thank you, Austin

---

body:

If we want to drain the swamp of politicians like Cindy Hyde-Smith then we need your support, or else she’ll win in November. name: DNC Headquarters
subject: Join us tomorrow in DC for the Families Belong Together rally >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
If you're angry and want to do something to reunite immigrant families, join us this Saturday.
---
We want to make sure you didn't miss the opportunity to come out tomorrow and support the fight to keep immigrant families together.

The DNC will be there in solidarity and we'll be asking folks to commit to vote for Democrats this November. **[We'd like you to join too, Derek.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212d9/4067b0a/6651561dc/7fbe8263/1041755597/VEsH/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/dnc/event/3233/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+Wed+like+you+to+join+tooCUSTOMDATASETslu&utm_campaign=em_20180629_dnc_fmk&source=em_20180629_dnc_fmk")**

Let us know you'll be there.

**[RSVP TODAY](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212d9/4067b0a/6651561dc/7fbe8260/1041755597/VEsE/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/dnc/event/3233/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+RSVP+TODAY&utm_campaign=em_20180629_dnc_fmk&source=em_20180629_dnc_fmk")**

See you soon,

The Democrats

\----------Forwarded Message----------
Sender: DNC Headquarters
Date: Tues, June 26th, 2018
Subject: [SATURDAY] We're marching for families

This Saturday, folks are rallying in D.C. -- and around the country -- to demand a permanent solution to end family separation at our border and help reunite immigrant parents and children.

The DNC will be there in solidarity while encouraging folks to commit to vote this November for Democrats -- **[and we'd like you to join too.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212d9/4067b0a/6651561dc/7fbe8261/1041755597/VEsF/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/dnc/event/3233/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+and+wed+like+you+to+join+too&utm_campaign=em_20180629_dnc_fmk&source=em_20180629_dnc_fmk")**

**Families Belong Together Rally**
**When:** Saturday, June 30th
**Time:** 10:00 a.m. - 2:00 p.m.
**Where:** Franklin Square
1332 I Street NW,
Washington, DC 20005

**[RSVP TO ATTEND](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212d9/4067b0a/6651561dc/7fbe826e/1041755597/VEsC/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/dnc/event/3233/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+RSVP+TO+ATTEND&utm_campaign=em_20180629_dnc_fmk&source=em_20180629_dnc_fmk")**
We all need to lend our voices to send a clear and distinct message to Trump and his administration: the humanitarian crisis they have caused will not be tolerated -- not now and certainly not at the ballot box this November.

We hope you'll join us this Saturday to rally and sign up voters.

Thanks,

The Democrats

If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, [**submit this form to unsubscribe**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212d9/4067b0a/6651561dc/7fbe826f/1041755597/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+submit+this+form+to+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em_20180629_dnc_fmk&source=em_20180629_dnc_fmk").

If you'd only like to receive our most important messages, [**sign up to receive less email**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212d9/4067b0a/6651561dc/7fbe826c/1041755597/VEsA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/less-email-signup?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+sign+up+to+receive+less+email&utm_campaign=em_20180629_dnc_fmk").

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't your preferred email address, [**update your contact information**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212d9/4067b0a/6651561dc/7fbe826d/1041755597/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/update-info-dnc?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180629_dnc_fmk"). If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, [**make a contribution today**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212d9/4067b0a/6651561dc/7fbe826a/1041755597/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-email-footer?refcode=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+make+a+contribution+today&utm_campaign=em_20180629_dnc_fmk&source=em_20180629_dnc_fmk"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Just reply to this email to send any comments, criticisms, or feedback. Our community management team reads every message from supporters like you. Thanks for supporting our party!

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www.Democrats.org](www.Democrats.org), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: Democrats are being outspent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
Friends, this is important:
**NBC News just reported that Florida 's Senate race - the one that POLITICO says will determine Senate control in 2018 - is the ONLY competitive race where Democrats are being outspent.**
Tea Party Gov. Rick Scott and his super PAC friends have already spent more than **$20 million** attacking my friend, Sen. Bill Nelson, and the Koch brothers have pledged up to $400 million to defeat Democrats this fall, so this is the worst possible moment for Bill to fall behind.
That's why I'm counting on you: I know from personal experience that grassroots donations are the difference between winning and losing, so I need you to step up and help me raise another $10,000 for Bill before midnight.
**[Please give $5 before midnight- time is running out - to help Bill Nelson win in Florida, take back the Senate for Democrats and protect the future of the Supreme Court:](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4bn?refcode=jtk858-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be automatically split between Bill Nelson and Jeanne Shaheen:_
**[Click to donate $5.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4bn?refcode=jtk858-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5)**
**[Click to donate $25.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4bn?refcode=jtk858-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25)**
**[Click to donate $50.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4bn?refcode=jtk858-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50)**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4bn?refcode=jtk858-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thank you,
Jeanne

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Shaheen for Senate email list, please click here.](http://www.democratsenators.org/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=CNI8l2gilQbAZ5ARlfTSSQdKz2hjuULV&url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.democratsenators.org%2Fo%2F23%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2F%3FEmail%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)

name: Dana Bye
subject: Important updates: Please read
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
So much is happening, Peter, and I have a few especially important updates to share:

First, I'm not sure if you saw yesterday's message from Abigail, but Larry Sabato took another look in his renowned Crystal Ball and updated his rating for the 7th District from "Leans Republican" to "Toss-up." This is a really big deal, and the excitement around the office is at an all-time high. (Stop by and see for yourself!)

Another update: Endorsements continue to roll in. The League of Conservation Voters. The National Committee for an Effective Congress. And that's on top of earlier endorsements by organizations like Emily's List and End Citizens United. Please know that this is all the direct result of YOUR hard work. #TeamSpanberger has shown truly exceptional dedication, enthusiasm, and support, and more people than ever are taking notice.

Speaking of support, our critical end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is coming up tomorrow, and we're short $12,734 of our goal. [Will you contribute today to help us gain steam going into tomorrow's deadline?](https://act.myngp.com/el/Uu92XJqDVpsynFiOYc0_6mbHU5yenSgnjGGZ9l42qCc=/wiYpe_lpHOSUbqjgMl_mJ_b8oXzoy_62UUq_e7ekUBI=?refcode=062918)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Uu92XJqDVpsynFiOYc0_6mbHU5yenSgnjGGZ9l42qCc=/wiYpe_lpHOSUbqjgMl_mJ_b8oXzoy_62UUq_e7ekUBI=?refcode=062918)
We're making tremendous strides in our effort to flip the 7th District, and I can't thank you enough for all you're doing. With precious few hours left in June, let's send a message around the District and the nation: We're committed, and we can win.

\- Dana Bye
_Campaign Manager, Spanberger for Congress_

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Uu92XJqDVpsynFiOYc0_6mbHU5yenSgnjGGZ9l42qCc=/AETmKK-mDBPD1BVetZPagm0muvKODzYq2ggIFF5J_-0=)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/Uu92XJqDVpsynFiOYc0_6mbHU5yenSgnjGGZ9l42qCc=/eIG7SQhSnOYSJvnnPuLHC3tvvClKPLcfZGczP4wLktM=)_

Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/Uu92XJqDVpsynFiOYc0_6mbHU5yenSgnjGGZ9l42qCc=/_bxMzA1Yt16lBevSsNT_T0LXuuaTFN3zBEiiHJ0Qzdw=).

name: Ted Lieu
subject: Tomorrow's deadline is important, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
If you want to hold the Trump administration accountable, the best course of action is electing a Democratic Congress in November.
---
My Republican colleagues in Congress have not merely failed to keep the Trump administration in check -- they've enabled and even celebrated the shameful policies coming from this White House. This November, it's time to put a stop to it.

Tomorrow's FEC deadline is a critical time to take action if we want to elect more Democrats who will stand up to Trump. So I'm asking:

**Will you make your first $3 donation of 2018 before tomorrow's deadline to elect Democrats up and down the ballot this year?**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212e7/4067b0a/664b0cc6e/7fbe8659/3296626399/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tl-june-deadline-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180629_tl_nd&source=em_20180629_tl_nd&refcode=em_20180629_tl_nd")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212e7/4067b0a/664b0cc6e/7fbe8666/3296626399/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tl-june-deadline-2018?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180629_tl_nd&source=em_20180629_tl_nd&refcode=em_20180629_tl_nd")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212e7/4067b0a/664b0cc6e/7fbe8667/3296626399/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tl-june-deadline-2018?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180629_tl_nd&source=em_20180629_tl_nd&refcode=em_20180629_tl_nd")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212e7/4067b0a/664b0cc6e/7fbe8664/3296626399/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tl-june-deadline-2018?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180629_tl_nd&source=em_20180629_tl_nd&refcode=em_20180629_tl_nd")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212e7/4067b0a/664b0cc6e/7fbe8665/3296626399/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tl-june-deadline-2018?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180629_tl_nd&source=em_20180629_tl_nd&refcode=em_20180629_tl_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212e7/4067b0a/664b0cc6e/7fbe8662/3296626399/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tl-june-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180629_tl_nd&source=em_20180629_tl_nd&refcode=em_20180629_tl_nd")
** The best -- and arguably the only -- way to hold this administration accountable is by regaining a Democratic majority in Congress this year.

My state of California is going to be critical to taking back control of the House -- there are seven highly flippable congressional districts held by Republicans that voted Democratic at the presidential level in the 2016 election. **That's almost one-third of the 23 congressional seats we need to flip in order to take back the House in November!** California held our primaries earlier this month, which means Democratic challengers in those districts are now preparing for the general.

Winning red-to-blue victories in California and nationwide will only be possible if we start organizing now -- so if you've been waiting for a chance to get involved in this year's elections, there's no better time than right now.

**[Make your first $3 donation of 2018 before tomorrow's deadline and together we will elect Democrats across the country.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212e7/4067b0a/664b0cc6e/7fbe8672/3296626399/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tl-june-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-++if+consinConsGroup29422+Donate+3+again+&utm_campaign=em_20180629_tl_nd&source=em_20180629_tl_nd&refcode=em_20180629_tl_nd")**

Thanks for your support,

Ted

Ted Lieu
U.S. Representative, CA-33

P.S. Together we have the power to take back Congress and keep this administration in check. **[Donate $3 before tomorrow's critical FEC deadline to say you're ready to elect Democrats across the country this year.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212e7/4067b0a/664b0cc6e/7fbe867f/3296626399/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tl-june-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+Donate+3+before+tomorrows+critical+FEC+d&utm_campaign=em_20180629_tl_nd&source=em_20180629_tl_nd&refcode=em_20180629_tl_nd")**

If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, [**submit this form to unsubscribe**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212e7/4067b0a/664b0cc6e/7fbe8607/3296626399/VEsP/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+submit+this+form+to+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em_20180629_tl_nd&source=em_20180629_tl_nd&refcode=em_20180629_tl_nd").

If you'd only like to receive our most important messages, [**sign up to receive less email**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212e7/4067b0a/664b0cc6e/7fbe860c/3296626399/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/less-email-signup?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+sign+up+to+receive+less+email&utm_campaign=em_20180629_tl_nd&refcode=em_20180629_tl_nd").

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't your preferred email address, [**update your contact information**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212e7/4067b0a/664b0cc6e/7fbe8608/3296626399/VEsHBA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/update-info-dnc?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180629_tl_nd&refcode=em_20180629_tl_nd"). If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, [**make a contribution today**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212e7/4067b0a/664b0cc6e/7fbe8609/3296626399/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-email-footer?refcode=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+make+a+contribution+today&utm_campaign=em_20180629_tl_nd&source=em_20180629_tl_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Just reply to this email to send any comments, criticisms, or feedback. Our community management team reads every message from supporters like you. Thanks for supporting our party!

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www.Democrats.org](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212e7/4067b0a/664b0cc6e/7fbe8616/3296626399/VEsHBg/ "http://www.Democrats.org?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+wwwDemocratsorg&utm_campaign=em_20180629_tl_nd&source=em_20180629_tl_nd&refcode=em_20180629_tl_nd"), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
clean_body: If you want to hold the Trump administration accountable, the best course of action is electing a Democratic Congress in November. My Republican colleagues in Congress have not merely failed to keep the Trump administration in check -- they've enabled and even celebrated the shameful policies coming from this White House. This November, it's time to put a stop to it. Tomorrow's FEC deadline is a critical time to take action if we want to elect more Democrats who will stand up to Trump. So I'm asking: Will you make your first $3 donation of 2018 before tomorrow's deadline to elect Democrats up and down the ballot this year? "" "" "" "" "" "" The best -- and arguably the only -- way to hold this administration accountable is by regaining a Democratic majority in Congress this year. My state of California is going to be critical to taking back control of the House -- there are seven highly flippable congressional districts held by Republicans that voted Democratic at the presidential level in the 2016 election. That's almost one-third of the 23 congressional seats we need to flip in order to take back the House in November! California held our primaries earlier this month, which means Democratic challengers in those districts are now preparing for the general. Winning red-to-blue victories in California and nationwide will only be possible if we start organizing now -- so if you've been waiting for a chance to get involved in this year's elections, there's no better time than right now. "" Thanks for your support, Ted Ted Lieu U.S. Representative, CA-33 P.S. Together we have the power to take back Congress and keep this administration in check. ""

name: The White House
subject: President and First Lady respond to the Capital Gazette shooting
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=98355cf5d3bb830eb06ecd5d019d4dee893bf6c221a6fe79e63a802db816356c07cbe793761d8793dad016168f2f93a069f67220eef93dba) The White House • June 29, 2018
## President and First Lady respond to the _Capital Gazette_ shooting
Traveling yesterday, President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump both responded to the horrific shooting at the _Capital Gazette_ newspaper offices in Annapolis, Maryland. President Trump said he was briefed on the shooting before concluding his trip in Wisconsin. "My thoughts and prayers are with the victims and their families. Thank you to all of the First Responders who are currently on the scene," the President tweeted. "Today's violence at the Capital Gazette was tragic & evil. My heart goes out to all affected in this brutal & senseless attack, & I send thoughts & prayers for comfort to the friends, family & colleagues of those killed & injured," the First Lady wrote. |
---
|

## The Day Ahead
President Trump will give remarks celebrating the 6-month anniversary of the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act at the White House. [Watch live at 12:15 p.m. ET. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=98355cf5d3bb830ea509dfccdf63cf6882577e7be64d3bbee28e428c26ca524fb2022722b6758316879e4d2904b3ba49a156d76ad2faf9f2)

---
|

## YOUR tax cuts, 6 months in
**On December 22, 2017** , President Trump signed into law the first real overhaul of the U.S. tax code in more than 30 years. The Tax Cuts and Jobs Act reduced taxes for the middle class, made American employers more competitive, and ensured that all American workers are able to keep more of their hard-earned money.
**Six months later** , unemployment has fallen to 3.8 percent, and more than 500 companies have announced benefits for their workers that include pay raises, bonuses, and expanded education support. Today, the President will highlight [stories from working families](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=98355cf5d3bb830e9451e52c215a231eec38cf4ce01f5fba75769753c90ea775d00be4e2fff45abbbe66f275b03801c84a4d1a6149b7281b) that show how tax cuts have made their hard work pay off like never before.
[Watch President Trump's speech live at 12:15 p.m. ET.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=98355cf5d3bb830ea509dfccdf63cf6882577e7be64d3bbee28e428c26ca524fb2022722b6758316879e4d2904b3ba49a156d76ad2faf9f2)
**More** : [Promise made, promise kept on tax cuts for Americans ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=98355cf5d3bb830ed8bda993ab7b65b425e3555ce1dc0dc79df42d7af13b260017b6003112a8fb374cb7c5c61177f4858f2265ce4cee08a5)

---
|

## Video of the day: President Trump breaks ground on new factory
**With President Trump in attendance** , electronics manufacturer Foxconn broke ground yesterday on a huge new plant in Mount Pleasant, Wisconsin. Once fully operational, the 20 _million_ square foot campus will employ 13,000 American workers.
**"It would never have happened** without the promise of the Trump tax cuts and the President's personal intervention," Commerce Secretary Wilbur Ross writes. "As important as the new factory is to the workers of Wisconsin, the facility is also a symbol of what is to come: It is the first of a large number of investments in advanced manufacturing facilities being reshored from overseas locations back to the United States."
[Watch President Trump help break ground on the new plant. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=98355cf5d3bb830e8822297ccc38e547b232cb602f42243c70f72e9df805bff4668a4f079ffe6d071af89ed1a6ebf96eafaf6026b3a88989)
**Secretary Ross** : [Foxconn investment is a sign of more to come.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=98355cf5d3bb830e06481a44c62fa9dac17bb389086f8640f359ff261e654dfad44db094230dae3e34feb8f1652c52642c66255c305b3060)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
**President Donald J. Trump participates in the groundbreaking ceremony of the Foxconn Facility** | June 28, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=98355cf5d3bb830ed1d454838e0018a4909a1c636c86b029d8d6bbc2f1776224009e4ae0468e42db8e05df6294c3e3094921c08eb151479e) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=98355cf5d3bb830efe3f73ec6a87169e38ff39879ad6ba27398068545c52e233868d2afa7ce683625dca70018e7b57f587c5ddfc6e083837) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4386c85b8a630f931d6701d92a22a4078d795a23875c2d97564a70cb674bfbdf8fb4a78bc30e5f3cc8684eee2d3197334e63bb92b94dccadd)
---

body:

Mary Barzee Flores is a leader, and she's got the experience and policies to back it up. **[I'm proud to endorse Mary Barzee Flores for Congress. Can you join me in my support of her campaign with a $20 donation?](https://act.myngp.com/el/Sm7Xk526I5IifvFkpLReATXsHUwBa88Nu4XZB8R63uU=/ua_qpIe0tMvKxJ9EEQdO-QUA0yFra66V33cBhEiRuVg=?refcode=180629-email-am&amount=20)** Mary has had a long career fighting for justice and equality. She began her career in the Office of Public Defender in Miami, where she worked for 12 years. Later, she was nominated by President Obama for a judgeship on the U.S. District Court in the Southern District of Florida. She was denied the appointment because of partisan politics. **[In her time as a judge, she was known for her tough but fair reputation. Tough but fair would go a long way in our divided and unruly Congress right now. Help me get Mary to Washington with a $20 donation.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Sm7Xk526I5IifvFkpLReATXsHUwBa88Nu4XZB8R63uU=/ua_qpIe0tMvKxJ9EEQdO-QUA0yFra66V33cBhEiRuVg=?refcode=180629-email-am&amount=20)** Mary has a tough road ahead of her and she needs our help. body:
Hi,

I just took a look at the numbers, and we're still $11,842 short of our end-of-quarter goal. The deadline is in less than 48 hours.

It's critical that we send Amy back to the Senate to continue fighting for us. Just last week President Trump promised to aggressively campaign in Minnesota -- there has never been a more important time to get involved.

I know we can hit our end-of-quarter goal with your help. Let's reelect Amy and keep Minnesota moving forward together.

Peter,

_You 're receiving this message because you are one of our top grassroots supporters._

This Saturday is the June Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline, which means every candidate in the country will have to lay down their cards and show their opponents, the pundits, and the media their true strength. The clock is ticking.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Sleep, what's that?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
#
Friends,
Writing to you from seat 14C on this American Airlines flight to San Antonio. Looking forward to the town halls, roundtables and events there and the campaigning in Dallas, Houston and Austin in the days following.
Lucky to have some time with Amy and the kids who came up to see me in D.C. this week. Pizza and gelato at night. And during the day while I'm at work, Amy has taken them to the museums, monuments and sights in D.C. (Building Museum = the kids' favorite).
As I head back to Texas, I've got to tell you that I'm grateful for all the support we're receiving and that is making this campaign possible. Grateful for this team, the staff, volunteers and supporters who are ensuring that we're a match for this moment, for all that is happening in our country, for all that we want to happen for our country.
Our work has never been more important, never been more urgent. It's never been more clear that everything we care about, especially for the generations that follow us, is at stake.
Whether the issue is ending protections for Americans with preexisting conditions, the treatment of children and families at our border or the selection of our next Supreme Court justice, what we do now will determine how we meet these challenges -- and whether Texas can lead in the bold, ambitious work of ensuring opportunity for everyone.
Thanks to you, we've run this campaign in the most honest, direct, grassroots way I could have imagined. You've helped me to visit all 254 counties in Texas; ensured that we could campaign without PACs, super PACs, corporations or special interests; and helped show our fellow Texans and this country that the power of people is where it's at. Town hall meetings in every part of the state, no matter how red or how blue, how small or how big. We've shown up. Raising money $10, $15, $25 at a time -- all from people -- and, in the process, outraising a sitting Senator who takes money from PACs and special interests.
With everything on the line for our country, we've got to run to win. And in order to make sure that no one is written off and no one is taken for granted, that we truly show up for everyone, we've got to run the strongest grassroots campaign the state has ever seen.
**But fundamental to achieving those goals is understanding -- and believing -- that we can win this. And that winning is on each one of us.**
However you measure it -- whether it's outraising Cruz in four of the last five reporting periods; public polls that show us down only 5 points with four months to go; or the 2,000 people who saw us in Plano on Sunday, the 20 who came out in Archer City at the beginning of the year, the urgency and commitment I've heard from those whom we've met and listened to in Desoto, Greenspoint, McAllen, Weslaco, Fort Stockton, Amarillo and the East Side of San Antonio -- we can win this. I see it, I hear it, I feel it. Everywhere I go.
But it's not going to happen on its own. It's going to take everything we've got -- every spare minute to call voters or knock on doors, every spare dollar -- to make sure we have the resources to reach the millions of Texans who will decide the future of this state and this country.
I promise you I'm making the most of everything that you commit to this campaign. If you've been following our live stream, you've seen us everywhere, listening to everyone, every day -- showing up for Texas, squeezing every waking minute out of the day and the night.
**Sleep, what's that?**
Let's make sure we do everything we can while we still can. There will be plenty of time to rest on November 7.
[**I'm grateful for your continued help and hope that you'll make a donation of $3 now so that we can continue to reach our fellow Texans over these next four months.**](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921a5/3b1d797/7a5780c4/35a98075/3753107528/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1806-eom?refcode=ema180629-eoq6&amount=3")
Grateful to be doing this with you!
Beto
**[Donate $3](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921a5/3b1d797/7a5780c4/35a98075/3753107528/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1806-eom?refcode=ema180629-eoq6&amount=3")**

* * *
Paid for by Beto for Texas
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921a5/3b1d797/7a5780c4/35a98076/3753107528/VEsF/ "http://action.betofortexas.com/page/s/fewer-emails") [ Click here to update your contact information.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921a5/3b1d797/7a5780c4/35a98077/3753107528/VEsC/ "https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/s/update-your-information") [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921a5/3b1d797/7a5780c4/35a98008/3753107528/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://secure.betofortexas.com/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

If you believe a Muslim ban is fundamentally un-American, help elect Democrats in November.

If you believe in full equality for LGBTQ people in all areas of our society, help elect Democrats in November.

If you believe Dreamers should be able to stay and contribute to the only country they call home, help elect Democrats in November.

If you believe climate change is an urgent threat to our economy, our environment, and our children's future, help elect Democrats in November.

If you believe our leaders should put people before corporations, help elect Democrats in November.

If you believe we should make it easier for people to vote, not harder, help elect Democrats in November.

Democrats and Republicans should reject any nominee who won't uphold our Constitution and our basic human rights, and who would vote to overturn Roe v. Wade.

Elections have consequences. The last Supreme Court vacancy was brazenly stolen by shameless Republican leaders with no respect for American democracy. We cannot let that happen again. This November, you won't just be deciding the next Congress, you will be deciding the direction America goes in for the next half-century.

**[If the last year and a half have made you angry, there's something you can do right now: Donate $3 before Saturday's deadline to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212fe/4067b0a/6643755ef/7fb15250/4157953500/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kennedy-retirement?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+If+the+last+year+and+a+half+have+made+yo&utm_campaign=em_20180629_tp_nd&source=em_20180629_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180629_tp_nd")**

Let's go,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, [**submit this form to unsubscribe**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212fe/4067b0a/6643755ef/7fb1525e/4157953500/VEsP/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+submit+this+form+to+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em_20180629_tp_nd&source=em_20180629_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180629_tp_nd").

If you'd only like to receive our most important messages, [**sign up to receive less email**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212fe/4067b0a/6643755ef/7fb1525f/4157953500/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/less-email-signup?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+sign+up+to+receive+less+email&utm_campaign=em_20180629_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180629_tp_nd").

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't your preferred email address, [**update your contact information**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212fe/4067b0a/6643755ef/7fb1525c/4157953500/VEsHBA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/update-info-dnc?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180629_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180629_tp_nd"). If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, [**make a contribution today**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212fe/4067b0a/6643755ef/7fb1525d/4157953500/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-email-footer?refcode=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+make+a+contribution+today&utm_campaign=em_20180629_tp_nd&source=em_20180629_tp_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Just reply to this email to send any comments, criticisms, or feedback. Our community management team reads every message from supporters like you. Thanks for supporting our party!

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www.Democrats.org](www.Democrats.org), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Nathan Hall
subject: I’m one of Mel Hall’s biggest supporters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/P7xVAwf150VWNqpsWtelqqFNsihdyCeTeE6d2Vp7hRU=/nbtePSH5glnvu4T-Mb7SL1RmamV87GbWJ6UguI5clO4=?refcode=em180629)

Fellow Hoosiers and friends,

My name is Nathan, and Mel Hall is my father. I'm obviously one of his biggest supporters, but it isn't just because he's family.

My Dad believes in making a difference; he's answering a call to public service so that he can help put the people of the 2nd District front and center again. I'm a big believer in his message of accountability and opportunity, and I hope you are too.

[**But to flip Indiana 's second congressional district blue, we need to go all-in for the upcoming FEC filing deadline. Make your gift of $5 or more before Saturday.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/P7xVAwf150VWNqpsWtelqqFNsihdyCeTeE6d2Vp7hRU=/nbtePSH5glnvu4T-Mb7SL1RmamV87GbWJ6UguI5clO4=?refcode=em180629)

I've had a front-row seat to my father's devotion to changing lives and living Hoosier values my whole life.

I spent my early childhood in inner-city Detroit because, after graduating from seminary, Dad asked to be sent where he was needed most. Those years are filled with memories of him serving meals, coaching basketball, counseling people in need--doing anything he could to support his adopted community.

Then we moved back home to Indiana, and I watched him run Press Ganey his way. He created jobs, raised wages, and ensured his employees had the best possible health care--the kinds of things that make everyone feel they are a part of the success of the company.

**Dad is going to bring much-needed integrity and accountability to D.C., but he needs our help to get there. Donate $ before Saturday 's deadline to say you're with my dad, Mel:**

_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/P7xVAwf150VWNqpsWtelqqFNsihdyCeTeE6d2Vp7hRU=/nbtePSH5glnvu4T-Mb7SL1RmamV87GbWJ6UguI5clO4=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em180629)

[Express Donate: $200](https://act.myngp.com/el/P7xVAwf150VWNqpsWtelqqFNsihdyCeTeE6d2Vp7hRU=/nbtePSH5glnvu4T-Mb7SL1RmamV87GbWJ6UguI5clO4=?express_lane=true&amount=200&refcode=em180629)
[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/P7xVAwf150VWNqpsWtelqqFNsihdyCeTeE6d2Vp7hRU=/nbtePSH5glnvu4T-Mb7SL1RmamV87GbWJ6UguI5clO4=?refcode=em180629)

Thank you,

Nathan Hall

---
| | Friends,
This week I was glad to [join President Trump and my fellow Republicans on the Appropriations Committee for lunch at the White House](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=110A132A9A3759). We discussed how we will continue to mend the broken government funding process and push forward with our work to fund important conservative priorities, including supporting our military and enhancing border security.

With my seat on the House Appropriations Committee, I'm in a strong position to ensure that AL-02's priorities are properly funded from year to year. On this committee, I am focused on important programs Alabama's farmers depend on and ensuring that Maxwell-Gunter Air Force Base and Fort Rucker continue to thrive, among many other priorities.

I appreciate the President taking the time to sit down with us this week as we work to get our conservative agenda over the finish line. I will always use my committee assignments to fight for AL-02 interests.

\- Martha

name: Sally Miller, Deputy Campaign Manager for Organizing
subject: This could be the next one vote margin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Health care. Abortion. Voting rights. Climate change.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4be10/c1f7015/6b807e4b/1142e9f2/1979739558/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june_eoq?refcode=rtw_20180629AM_em-B") Team -- **in 2017 we saved health care by just one vote.** Millions of Americans with pre-existing conditions and people struggling to afford care were able to stay on their insurance because we held the line in the U.S. Senate by the slimmest of margins. **This is the potential power of winning even one seat in the Senate.** **Health care. Abortion. Voting rights. Climate change. Another conservative Justice on the Supreme Court.** **This could be the next one vote margin** \-- and I know we absolutely cannot leave this up to chance. Our team is organizing our heart out to win this race and ensure Tina can be that deciding vote for our values. But we haven't had years to prepare for this race, we've had to ramp up in just a few months. **And now we 're less than 48 hours away from our most important FEC deadline** \-- when we will know if we have the resources to win this race. **[That's why I'm asking: will you rush a contribution before our deadline tomorrow so we can hit our grassroots goal and have the resources to keep this Senate seat in Democratic hands? clean_body: Health care. Abortion. Voting rights. Climate change. | "" Team -- in 2017 we saved health care by just one vote. Millions of Americans with pre-existing conditions and people struggling to afford care were able to stay on their insurance because we held the line in the U.S. Senate by the slimmest of margins. This is the potential power of winning even one seat in the Senate. Health care. Abortion. Voting rights. Climate change. Another conservative Justice on the Supreme Court. This could be the next one vote margin \-- and I know we absolutely cannot leave this up to chance. Our team is organizing our heart out to win this race and ensure Tina can be that deciding vote for our values. But we haven't had years to prepare for this race, we've had to ramp up in just a few months. And now we 're less than 48 hours away from our most important FEC deadline \-- when we will know if we have the resources to win this race. name: Jason Yates
subject: Rarely does this happen
body:
Peter,
It’s not often that we see such strong support and bipartisan support on an issue.
A few weeks ago I asked you to write your Senators and encourage them to pass The FIRST STEP Act (S. 2795/H.R. 5682), an important piece of legislation the House has passed.
The legislation would make significant changes to the federal prison system to better assess individual needs and expand access to federal prison programs. These programs include faith-based programs and resources in an effort to reduce the rate of which prisoners re-offend, after serving their time.
This legislation takes meaningful steps in the right direction to bring valuable reform to the prison system.
Many of you expressed your support to the Senate on this bill already – thank you for taking the time to do so. But I’m asking you to make your voice heard one more time on this issue.
A very unique and rare occurrence has happened.
**Over 300 Christian leaders have signed a letter urging Senate leadership to pass the FIRST STEP Act.**
Peter, you know as well as I do that getting many leaders to agree on something is rare; it certainly speaks to the importance of this legislation.
So, I want to invite you to join hundreds of faith leaders in sending a powerful message to the leadership in the Senate.
[Take just a minute to look at the leaders who are urging the Senate on this issue and most importantly sign your name to the letter if you agree](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180629petn01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180629petn01nd&n=1)!
Together, as a community of faith, we are sending one unified and powerful message to the Senate urging them to pass the FIRST STEP Act.
Thank you for joining thousands of like-minded Christians to make your voice heard in Washington D.C. and to make an impact across the nation!
[](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180629petn01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180629petn01nd&n=2)
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180629petn01nd&n=3)
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180629petn01nd&n=4).

name: Cate Domino, bobcasey.com
subject: last chance: match extended
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e61bb/51dbcc2a/1b389962/3a4f643/2397791107/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")

I won't sugarcoat it, team:

We didn't meet our $15,000 match goal before the deadline. Thankfully, our match donors are extending the deadline to midnight tonight. We need to take advantage of this because if we don't, the consequences could be devastating.

Ever since Bob voted against the GOP's anti-middle-class tax scheme, they've really stepped up their attacks. President Trump himself smeared Bob on Twitter for that vote and attacked him on stage at an NRA rally for refusing to support some of the most divisive pieces of the Trump agenda.

With attacks coming from the very top of the Republican establishment, this campaign needs to be prepared to fight back. But budgets are tight, and right now our advertising is on the chopping block. **That's why this match opportunity is so important: it's a chance for grassroots supporters to come together to make a game-changing investment to protect Pennsylvania's Democratic Senate seat.**

We don't have much time before the match expires, and there is another $3,280 worth of match dollars to unlock. **Can you give $5 to support Bob right now? Every dollar will be doubled.**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 (Becomes $10)](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180629_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

Cate

body:
It’s a DOUBLE MATCH. To make sure we reach every corner of New Jersey in preparation for what will be a competitive general election.... [ ](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=11279b92f7744d6298e7db6b6675139a&_e=VulnlU08xdFmRUQuva5b-6tEbVHyN3u1WJff8LIksAzt6uRUqofZag3tY5aueUiOlnhhvtTtILuiEh9GmwSXlK8jNO3c-RDPSK8F0mHSI2T2Cya2OQULhldZsmBokrJiYw0r0GKayip_98dzdpVS88B-_yPC72-16k_RVPpc8g07l8YyHPm6beAW_wYtR_r3GQbtXdd4w3NRZNNDWiO0GUfXsYPxadJ_UIIUOKcOh7yH2kwEP05LsgsYYqaP3RV-ceN9_uvLBhsnSLzEPqb2Nteu-FINcQ9Sq_GixcRWDdHy9ExIXW7htPuC8IwYUH8o107CSpsSJCmEefWjce2mGeGJudS_jvM2205tvs9L0R1gqirkzzmHlTMEU2dNs6eDyjsgOm4E2a6sNBALWCE5MKKuwnvqQMc1BNXLFQhF6Z4%3D) | |

Peter,
_Opportunities like this don’t come around often...._

_**It’s a DOUBLE MATCH.**_

**To make sure we reach every corner of New Jersey – from Wantage to Cape May, Moorestown to Elizabeth – in preparation for what will be a competitive general election, a generous group of New Jersey donors has agreed to DOUBLE MATCH every single donation made online between now and midnight June 30.**

Thankfully, we’ve already seen an outpouring of support from New Jerseyans who are sick and tired of corrupt politicians like Bob Menendez using the people’s Senate seat for his own personal gain.

They know that former Marine and successful job creator Bob Hugin will be different. He will be a Senator that we can all be proud of.

But unfortunately _w _e_ ’re running out of time_ – with **less than 48 hours** left to hit our **$50,000 June End of Quarter Online Fundraising Goal,** we still have a long way to go.

Here’s how much we still have to raise:

**Goal: $50,000**
**Needed: $18,932**
**Suggested Donation: $25**
[ **DOUBLE MATCH
$25 = $50**
](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=11279b92f7744d6298e7db6b6675139a&_e=VulnlU08xdFmRUQuva5b-6tEbVHyN3u1WJff8LIksAzt6uRUqofZag3tY5aueUiOlnhhvtTtILuiEh9GmwSXlErAVmhPZbKhGqkwhbhuAsKYeuTK-jkuv0m2fg2z9qnXY4qe-3xviV-gKY0jlYi04ZEodtr7KfOyE_vg5bhvjDIguEEUSVg9h4zkfNAGOVzJVRgDASEgiRKwwOdgeqZpUxq56mxFr3xeYAQFkrb5Kd3GBVbZRtLER2bJJCg2nLBVitmzwe-HvnyptJeXQlIpcXgr1cWJl8gvg_cDkv2PnPGdnr5Fyvg--6gX1sjeq9AHsg5W6f83gakA5r7x9LB58DlYclmlJMPeYILi27f0VaI6hkLdiFTN_SlStE3p43v2UuXf1hJGyBBejRLeIRz_29_9cxmm0rs0MI7s90EzCwt9vaG9JQk4t5lMsyJ9KVFq)
As one of Bob’s top supporters, we are counting on you, Peter.

clean_body: It’s a DOUBLE MATCH. To make sure we reach every corner of New Jersey in preparation for what will be a competitive general election.... | | Peter, Opportunities like this don’t come around often.... It’s a DOUBLE MATCH. To make sure we reach every corner of New Jersey – from Wantage to Cape May, Moorestown to Elizabeth – in preparation for what will be a competitive general election, a generous group of New Jersey donors has agreed to DOUBLE MATCH every single donation made online between now and midnight June 30. Thankfully, we’ve already seen an outpouring of support from New Jerseyans who are sick and tired of corrupt politicians like Bob Menendez using the people’s Senate seat for his own personal gain. They know that former Marine and successful job creator Bob Hugin will be different. He will be a Senator that we can all be proud of. But unfortunately w e ’re running out of time – with less than 48 hours left to hit our $50,000 June End of Quarter Online Fundraising Goal, we still have a long way to go. Here’s how much we still have to raise: Goal: $50,000 Needed: $18,932 Suggested Donation: $25 As one of Bob’s top supporters, we are counting on you, Peter. Now more than ever, we need a Senator who will put New Jersey first and serve with honor. Thank you, Stacy Schuster Campaign Manager Bob Hugin for Senate P.S. This deadline is critical to our campaign’s momentum. We have a HUGE opportunity to mobilize every member of Team Hugin and we only have until MIDNIGHT TOMORROW to hit our goal. Visit this safe and secure link to double match your donation and help us crush this first test since our strong primary victory: | | | Paid for by Bob Hugin for Senate, Inc. | | PO BOX 8656, Somerville, NJ 08876 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

[ ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=3efeaa79294e4054b2e3480022eab00b&_e=mMxETRiOHTKX8uKOBD2JEh_YZjayDem8hjB6CnA3I21s1cmdt91V3JaIHPGUotv_ntED0Zpk7LCSpUkMbIKvqDDPTxXeN7xvb3dxSJe59sayo4WQRbxkB_lsbhnwphx0G5zjvVnA4VPKexiAY_TmUTZTPNY0JV00jOIF-HpWWOgwl0GNom4dtXNpe6ZpxPANu8NiUXnCI_l3cXYLylDkNA4dFcn7_bRTZ0l_nILCkkknwXM-FSSup0fM08oT27lwGdviVaz4CvwIWAhqxghZCQ%3D%3D) | |

Peter - we just wanted to reach out to make sure you saw our email yesterday.

As we near the Independence Day holiday, Gov. Kasich's message about how to heal our nation's politics couldn't be more important. [We could use your help before Saturday's deadline!](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=3efeaa79294e4054b2e3480022eab00b&_e=mMxETRiOHTKX8uKOBD2JEkZlQ9KQEufQn2tC1JenPOthGYRqYJ_30xUpXiqjuePJNZi6PCjtAD6b4u2oEPWXNclHVEYm85W5yplZy0ZVAGtKmpog7MBgSNxMO5gIKpFUf8K0Q6p0zyZm9L-lxB8bgOO3uA2ZaZle3iM4maE7QDyOn9iFFNXNNcN_x-HfhC8p4yozJBVk3GJ68e377XAISMLw6vDCBVUDdmeHeq8BwJ3peX13n9nNloorpMzcBMp0tV5vcPeHOzlKWoSLTv4Qug%3D%3D)

Thank you for all that you're doing.

-Team Kasich
|

**_-Message Sent: June 28, 2018-_**
|

Peter - two quick updates for you.

1\. We wanted to be sure that you saw [Gov. John Kasich's interview](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=3efeaa79294e4054b2e3480022eab00b&_e=mMxETRiOHTKX8uKOBD2JElfNxzdL61JV9EvyVt-j8iWq3o3nY0OXuoTAV7HxCq0yYsIu6MM2uSgZgNuLm42L1zP5uwhW9Rb_gmBsXOzJQbpN4QrnyBk-59eYa3wKXXAgd7YIFKM4xZIRAvJvZ2wLnhyV3NRt_hFfiAj29zboPi90rBBPPcK8A4eDp_TLO0AHlV7R1lVUw5frm0XVT1stZZDgYIrzLtodQA-FsFxr1qS5SbSqJjquWG7LrEY9u8dpMQC2rpqibyzajXj2n2O4A_LUgopFTB3kNLC120jHp6k%3D) on the first episode of PBS' relaunched show, "Firing Line." Some of you may remember this show that was hosted by Conservative William F. Buckley from 1966-1999.

[ ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=3efeaa79294e4054b2e3480022eab00b&_e=mMxETRiOHTKX8uKOBD2JElfNxzdL61JV9EvyVt-j8iWq3o3nY0OXuoTAV7HxCq0yYsIu6MM2uSgZgNuLm42L1y9Jsu8xVCE35V-S-vfi7SKA3M-Z2yLo04RV4TzJ0h5h5AiUMC7N3UpMGmBvDWwb8MYVMZB-LnY4-Y-_DOTu7l5DwI55MvRVkCVh6ASSfu1Lr4-Jf-uXdTub0JwelNFGZVor-k881qP0NhYZH3tpN8ZA4Afv_dsXOwCEB1kIX4tVpRlotVJsLplxf7oRl5kfl7mcifp_RTANSZuhsIq4M30%3D)
2\. We have a critical June fundraising deadline on Saturday. [**Please consider chipping in to help support Gov. John Kasich's message**](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=3efeaa79294e4054b2e3480022eab00b&_e=mMxETRiOHTKX8uKOBD2JEkZlQ9KQEufQn2tC1JenPOthGYRqYJ_30xUpXiqjuePJX9tXwhqZ2nK2Ok2NT3qwJYTVfNk6cjAAYk_zqj5zCPmCTgYlw4mtN92AnCCZ_v5VF7J9wnUx89pX9xXTzy5zsiva9ajMd7NGm4lVuW_jh0K58hQwbq21gWk-2UDaE_yQ3S2ihoMokhTd3Rpsq4_OkFKqbpeHvPIG1W8u91viQKFYh5BGYcxErFmBGMIbq1ndGRklbk6bVmHrHmBAbCRdHA%3D%3D).

You've seen him be a leading voice ending the separation of children and parents at our borders. He has called for a return to civility, truth and governing with not only our hearts, but with good, bipartisan public policy that actually improves the lives of all Americans.

**Peter,[we could use your help before Saturday](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=3efeaa79294e4054b2e3480022eab00b&_e=mMxETRiOHTKX8uKOBD2JEkZlQ9KQEufQn2tC1JenPOthGYRqYJ_30xUpXiqjuePJMSfGtzQL0ffA4uvDVc0xqjZ60ibrIDspj8XeT5QUvWEbWf0XNDcV6DZ6kiK_42uqg1OzgHHSsfxkcSNt10SRX7BldUAiflcU0yzCCed0xBIeZBIb6kYqfdr7E0aGp2YEpUfgtOli7iDxqMbtRzjnvil5s82d6uSJfuPG4eRTiil6s6yGEt0oc0wGlKdE7i7cMDbq6GFWNP1bm6Zh7vNwfQ%3D%3D)** to ensure we have the funds to keep paying for these grassroots efforts!

name: Katie McGinty
subject: proud to endorse
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/QvlgtJjE4NOuZYgx5n2PQg==/ILSIANzO66RzdhZI0DpNFg==)
Friends --

At this pivotal moment in America, we need our leaders in Washington working together to find real solutions to issues Americans face every day.

That is why I'm proud to endorse George Scott for Congress in Pennsylvania's 10th Congressional District, and I'm asking for your support of his campaign to win in an area controlled by Republicans for far too long. **I was especially excited to see that the latest polling shows George in a statistical tie with his Republican opponent -- we will win this race!**
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/QvlgtJjE4NOuZYgx5n2PQg==/fwmpkt5D92d8Fsfh2OrjBg==)
---
George has spent his life in service to his country and community. He served our nation for 20 years on active duty in the United States Army as a military intelligence officer stationed around the world. In 2009, George sensed a calling of a different kind, entered seminary, and became a Lutheran pastor. He has served at Trinity Lutheran Church in East Berlin until taking a leave of absence in February 2018 so he could devote all of his time to his campaign. He is committed and ready to serve in our Congress.

George's priorities are our priorities - Creating good jobs at good wages - Strengthening public education - Quality and affordable healthcare for all. These issues unite all Pennsylvanians as we strive to make our families' lives better.

[But George can't win alone - he needs us all to stand with him as he brings integrity, service, and compassion back to Washington D.C. Will you join me in supporting George with a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100 or more before **midnight this Saturday?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/QvlgtJjE4NOuZYgx5n2PQg==/fwmpkt5D92d8Fsfh2OrjBg==)
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/QvlgtJjE4NOuZYgx5n2PQg==/fwmpkt5D92d8Fsfh2OrjBg==)
---
The 10th Congressional District is in south central Pennsylvania, with the seat currently held by Republican Scott Perry, a member of the far-right Freedom Caucus. With the new district lines drawn by Pennsylvania's Supreme Court after throwing out the Republican-gerrymandered maps.

Democrats have the first real opportunity in over 50 years for Democrats to flip the seat from "red" to "blue". The new map and a great candidate make a combination that I believe will create a big win in our nationwide effort to take back the House!

I am working to help George win this November, and I hope you will too!

\-- Katie McGinty

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/QvlgtJjE4NOuZYgx5n2PQg==/fwmpkt5D92d8Fsfh2OrjBg==)
---

Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/QvlgtJjE4NOuZYgx5n2PQg==/sN04GYIpyOtKhQC0lmGQSw==).

name: Painter For Minnesota
subject: One Day Left!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Painter Minnesota
body:
| [ ](http://www.painterminnesota.com/?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_day_left&n=1)
---
Friend -- Tomorrow is the end of our fiscal quarter! To meet our projections for this point in the campaign, **we need to close a $19,072 fundraising gap**. Richard has spent the last two weeks going nonstop: speaking to campaign finance reform groups in D.C., attending a Somali community discussion, speaking to the media about the Supreme Court, and listening to voters' concerns at town halls. We are fighting to fix the system and taking every opportunity we can to get Richard's message out to the people. But we also practice what we preach. This campaign gets its fuel from the dollars of individuals like you, not the rubles of Russian agents or the checkbooks of lobbyists. We are not accepting ANY money from PACs, Super PACs, or dark money organizations.**** Help us meet our projections for this quarter and go further into the primary season with our best foot forward! **Can you contribute $5, $10, $27 or $100?** [](https://www.painterminnesota.com/contribute?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_day_left&n=2) Thank you for your consideration, Painter For Minnesota

Richard has spent the last two weeks going nonstop: speaking to campaign finance reform groups in D.C., attending a Somali community discussion, speaking to the media about the Supreme Court, and listening to voters' concerns at town halls. We are fighting to fix the system and taking every opportunity we can to get Richard's message out to the people. But we also practice what we preach. This campaign gets its fuel from the dollars of individuals like you, not the rubles of Russian agents or the checkbooks of lobbyists. We are not accepting ANY money from PACs, Super PACs, or dark money organizations.** Help us meet our projections for this quarter and go further into the primary season with our best foot forward! Can you contribute $5, $10, $27 or $100?** Thank you for your consideration, Painter For Minnesota | Prepared and Paid for by Painter Minnesota Painter Minnesota · PO Box 6780, Minneapolis, MN 55406, United States

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Help Kick King Off TV
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
I’m sure you’re as tired as I am of seeing Steve King getting national headlines just for being divisive. He was on CNN earlier this week and as usual, he didn’t mention that we're on the verge of a farm crisis. Or health care. Or anything that impacts our district. He likes to talk about “us vs them.” I talk about “we.” For example, **WE are going to vote him out this November.** Click on the image below to see King’s most recent interview with CNN:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1527958/8228687/682770259?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzQ0ZmJhOC1kMDdiLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ql4U25inwpwDkRD7Zha_rxLNelx6OTHmAUbOzkHXIOc=)
This is what Steve King does. He has no problem giving a platform to a neo-Nazi to spread his divisiveness because it serves as a distraction to the fact that he has no answer for health care. When he says “Diversity is not our strength,” it’s because he doesn’t have an answer for farmers who have struggled to make a profit for four consecutive years. When he says, “We can't restore our civilization with somebody else's babies,” it’s because he won’t stand up and hold the administration accountable for the tariffs or the EPA’s attack on the Renewable Fuel Standard, both of which will be economically devastating to our district. He has a national platform to talk about these issues but instead he uses that time to talk about his personal agenda. **While Steve King focuses on making national news, my campaign is focused on actually helping the people of this district.**
**_[Contribute today to help us hit our critical end-of-quarter goal!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1527959/8228688/682770259?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzQ0ZmJhOC1kMDdiLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ql4U25inwpwDkRD7Zha_rxLNelx6OTHmAUbOzkHXIOc=)_** **Together, we can defeat Steve King and make sure CNN has no reason to invite him back after November. **
Standing Tall for All,
J.D. Scholten

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1527960/8228689/682770259?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzQ0ZmJhOC1kMDdiLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ql4U25inwpwDkRD7Zha_rxLNelx6OTHmAUbOzkHXIOc=)

Scholten4Iowa

Sioux City, IA 51102
