name: Andrew Gillum
subject: The biggest moment in this race
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3000/9e00690/46e0f3e8/2402dd2f/2655130785/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180629_EOQ4_fnd_gq_act__AG&source=em18_180629_EOQ4_fnd_gq_act__AG")
Friends,

Last night, NextGen America and Tom Steyer announced they're backing our grassroots movement to take back Florida.

They've been on the frontlines of fighting climate change, protecting our environment and standing up to the dangerous Trump Administration. And that's exactly what we'll do in the Governor's mansion.

**[Can you chip in $5 to power our people-powered campaign?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3000/9e00690/46e0f3e8/2402dd2e/2655130785/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-june-eoq?gpsid=13_55_1748&refcode=em18_180629_EOQ4_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_campaign=em18_180629_EOQ4_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+Can+you+chip+in++ask++to+power+our+peopl")**

The Republicans and cynics are going to come after us -- but we know that power cedes nothing without a demand.

Bring it home,

Andrew

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: The Supreme Court
body:
This week brought news that will help shape the future of the U.S. Supreme Court, and our nation, for generations to come. That's because, with... | | |
---
| |
---
| **_The Supreme Court_** This week brought news that will shape the future of the U.S. Supreme Court, and our nation, for generations to come.

That's because we now know that President Donald Trump's Supreme Court picks won't stop with the fantastic choice of Justice Neil Gorsuch. With the announcement this week that Justice Anthony Kennedy is retiring, President Trump will now get a second Supreme Court choice.

This is great news for conservatives, because with more big decisions sure to come before the court, we know we'll have another justice with a solid reputation. He or she will apply the U.S. Constitution as it's written, and not how liberal activists want it interpreted.

And it also places the spotlight squarely on Democrat Joe Donnelly and the November elections. As Democrats continue to speculate about a "blue wave," we must make sure we block it with a "red wall" in November. We cannot let Democrats continue to obstruct and prevent President Trump's nominee from being confirmed.

And that's where we come in. Throughout the summer and moving into the fall, we must redouble our efforts, going out and knocking on doors, calling voters, and talking to our family and friends. We must make sure that we send** Mike Braun** to the United States Senate, who -- unlike Democrat Donnelly -- will always stand with President Donald Trump.

On the campaign trail, President Trump promised he would nominate a constitutional conservative to the bench, and he delivered in a big way with Judge Gorsuch. I, for one, can't wait to see who he picks next!
-Kyle Hupfer

_Caption: Last night, Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer met with Republicans in Delaware County to discuss our shared work toward victory this November. Thanks to Delaware County Chairman Victor Whitehead for putting together a fantastic monthly meeting!_
---
| |
---
| | **_Governor Holcomb's Week That Was_**
---
|
---
| **_Indiana Leads in Agriculture Innovation_**
Today's agriculture is high-tech and innovative. And Hoosiers are leading that innovation, developing new ways to tackle the biggest agriculture issues of the day, such as how to feed the world's growing population.

That's why **Governor Eric Holcomb** was excited to join two big leaders in Indiana's agriculture community this week, AgriNovus Indiana and the National FFA, as they announced a major addition to the National FFA Convention in Indianapolis this October -- The Blue Room.

The Blue Room will be a 17,000-square-foot interactive plaza that places students in the driver's seat on developing 21st Century ag solutions. It will inspire the next generation of FFA members to become real ag innovators, and it's all happening right here in Indiana.

[Learn more](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6b7cfa22fe&e=1acd9bb3d6) about The Blue Room, and how Indiana is a leader in ag innovation!
---
|
---
| | **_The Mike Braun Corner_**
---
|
---
| **_Democrat Donnelly's Obamacare Vs. Mike Braun's Free Market Solutions_**
When it comes to fixing our nation's health care issues, this week we saw a clear contrast between Democrat Joe Donnelly and conservative outsider **Mike Braun**.

In one corner, there's Democrat Donnelly, who this month admitted that he was the deciding vote against last year's attempt to repeal Obamacare. This week, he [doubled down on his support](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fda2f97c99&e=1acd9bb3d6) for the failed law, which has left Hoosiers with [dwindling choices](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b754af5255&e=1acd9bb3d6) (from eight choices in 2015 to just two choices today) and [rising premiums](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e1ae222d09&e=1acd9bb3d6) (which increased 74% between 2013 and 2017). No matter how much Obamacare fails Hoosiers, he just keeps voting to keep it.

And then in the other corner is**Mike Braun,** who has first-hand experience with providing real health care solutions to his employees in southern Indiana. This week, he said, “In my experience in the real world, running a business and creating good jobs for fellow Hoosiers, we haven’t raised premiums for employees in a decade. In the Senate, I will use my business experience and work with President Trump to fully repeal Obamacare and implement free-market solutions that will provide better healthcare for Hoosiers.”

The choice is clear:**Mike Braun** will work for real health care solutions, while Democrat Donnelly will continue to stand by a law that just isn't working for Hoosiers.
---
|
---
| | **_Join the GOParty at the Lucas Oil Estate!_**
---
|
---
| **_Your Republican Party Is Throwing a GOParty!_**
You’re invited to join **Governor Eric Holcomb** , **Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer** and our **2018 statewide team **at the Lucas Oil Estate in Carmel for a big GOParty in July!

Enjoy a live performance from My Yellow Rickshaw along with dancing, food, and drinks! This is a fun opportunity to support Governor Holcomb and our entire 2018 statewide team.

Learn more [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0c43827ad6&e=1acd9bb3d6), and RSVP to Corinne at [CHerndon@indiana.gop](mailto:CHerndon@indiana.gop)
---
|
---
| _**News You Can Use**_ **Governor Eric Holcomb** [makes boards and commission appointments](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8c0adcd3f0&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch** [presents the Golden Hoosier Award](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=86e1fe6525&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Secretary of State Connie Lawson** [is safeguarding our state's elections](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4b93ac366e&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Treasurer Kelly Mitchell** [is helping families save for college](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2c72390e61&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Superintendent Jennifer McCormick** [attended a STEM Summit at the White House](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7134dbbe67&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski** [voted to rebuild our military and give troops a pay raise](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c5d915fe9a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks** [is working on the 2019 national defense bill](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=970a1faf49&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Todd Rokita** [supports the Supreme Court's decision on public sector unions](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=73da631c12&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Susan Brooks** [is seeking clarification on immigration policy](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7aaed0ba3c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Luke Messer** [voted for the 2018 Farm Bill](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=72f4b641b2&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Larry Buchson** [votes to modernize review process for foriegn direct investment](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cf6308bf04&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Trey Hollingsworth **[co-sponsors bill to pilot lowering age to drive large trucks across state lines](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f23babd101&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | |
---
This week, **Indiana Auditor Tera Klutz** [unveiled Indiana's newly-updated Transparency Portal](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9b72c29199&e=1acd9bb3d6). The streamlined, more user-friendly site now makes it even easier for Hoosiers to see their tax dollars at work!

As Auditor Klutz says, "We're responsible for spending taxpayer money, so they have a right to know exactly how it's spent."

Check out the [Indiana Transparency Portal here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=55c6c4abae&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

| [Read More](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dd199ad2c0&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Read More")
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=885067e672&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
Democrat Joe Donnelly is "proud" of continued support for Obamacare, [bragging that he was the deciding vote](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1147c717fc&e=1acd9bb3d6) against last year's unsuccessful attempt at repeal.

**Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer** was quoted as saying, "Democrat Donnelly is doubling down on his embrace of Obamacare and is finally conceding that he was, in fact, the deciding vote to perpetuate the premium spikes, lost coverage and overall chaos and disarray brought about by this law."
| [Read More](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e218cde462&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Read More")
---
| |
---
**Vice President Mike Pence** was in South America this week, meeting with leaders in Brazil, Ecuador, and Guatemala on critical issues that impact people across the Western Hemisphere.

While in South America, **Vice President Pence** discussed global trade, the migrant crisis, and working with our allies to place pressure on socialist Venezuela.

Follow along with the vice president's trip in [real time on Twitter](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a70a8386dc&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

clean_body: This week brought news that will help shape the future of the U.S. Supreme Court, and our nation, for generations to come. That's because, with... | | | | | | The Supreme Court This week brought news that will shape the future of the U.S. Supreme Court, and our nation, for generations to come. That's because we now know that President Donald Trump's Supreme Court picks won't stop with the fantastic choice of Justice Neil Gorsuch. With the announcement this week that Justice Anthony Kennedy is retiring, President Trump will now get a second Supreme Court choice. This is great news for conservatives, because with more big decisions sure to come before the court, we know we'll have another justice with a solid reputation. He or she will apply the U.S. Constitution as it's written, and not how liberal activists want it interpreted. And it also places the spotlight squarely on Democrat Joe Donnelly and the November elections. As Democrats continue to speculate about a "blue wave," we must make sure we block it with a "red wall" in November. We cannot let Democrats continue to obstruct and prevent President Trump's nominee from being confirmed. And that's where we come in. Throughout the summer and moving into the fall, we must redouble our efforts, going out and knocking on doors, calling voters, and talking to our family and friends. We must make sure that we send Mike Braun to the United States Senate, who -- unlike Democrat Donnelly -- will always stand with President Donald Trump. On the campaign trail, President Trump promised he would nominate a constitutional conservative to the bench, and he delivered in a big way with Judge Gorsuch. I, for one, can't wait to see who he picks next! -Kyle Hupfer Caption: Last night, Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer met with Republicans in Delaware County to discuss our shared work toward victory this November. Thanks to Delaware County Chairman Victor Whitehead for putting together a fantastic monthly meeting! | | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Indiana Leads in Agriculture Innovation Today's agriculture is high-tech and innovative. And Hoosiers are leading that innovation, developing new ways to tackle the biggest agriculture issues of the day, such as how to feed the world's growing population. That's why Governor Eric Holcomb was excited to join two big leaders in Indiana's agriculture community this week, AgriNovus Indiana and the National FFA, as they announced a major addition to the National FFA Convention in Indianapolis this October -- The Blue Room. The Blue Room will be a 17,000-square-foot interactive plaza that places students in the driver's seat on developing 21st Century ag solutions. It will inspire the next generation of FFA members to become real ag innovators, and it's all happening right here in Indiana. about The Blue Room, and how Indiana is a leader in ag innovation! | | | The Mike Braun Corner | | Democrat Donnelly's Obamacare Vs. Mike Braun's Free Market Solutions When it comes to fixing our nation's health care issues, this week we saw a clear contrast between Democrat Joe Donnelly and conservative outsider Mike Braun. In one corner, there's Democrat Donnelly, who this month admitted that he was the deciding vote against last year's attempt to repeal Obamacare. This week, he for the failed law, which has left Hoosiers with (from eight choices in 2015 to just two choices today) and (which increased 74% between 2013 and 2017). No matter how much Obamacare fails Hoosiers, he just keeps voting to keep it. And then in the other corner isMike Braun, who has first-hand experience with providing real health care solutions to his employees in southern Indiana. This week, he said, “In my experience in the real world, running a business and creating good jobs for fellow Hoosiers, we haven’t raised premiums for employees in a decade. In the Senate, I will use my business experience and work with President Trump to fully repeal Obamacare and implement free-market solutions that will provide better healthcare for Hoosiers.” The choice is clear:Mike Braun will work for real health care solutions, while Democrat Donnelly will continue to stand by a law that just isn't working for Hoosiers. | | | Join the GOParty at the Lucas Oil Estate! | | Your Republican Party Is Throwing a GOParty! name: Kerry Gooch
subject: NEW POLL: Paul's in the lead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
body:
TO: Peter
FROM: Kerry Gooch, Campaign Manager, Paul Davis for Kansas
RE: New polling data in KS-02

New polling data, conducted by The Mellman Group, was just released. The bottom line is this:

**Despite the Republican lean of Kansas ' 2nd District, Paul leads the pack! **
* **Paul leads by 5 points, 39%-34%, against Republicans ' leading challenger**
* **Paul 's lead grows to 9 points the more voters know about him**
* **Paul is both the best known and most liked candidate**

**Our campaign is very encouraged by these numbers, but we take nothing for granted.**

Outside super PACs have already pledged to spend $1.25 million in misleading attack ads against Paul, and we know that is only the beginning. If these attacks take hold, our lead could evaporate by the fall.

Our critical end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is tomorrow and we're still coming up a little short on our ambitious goal. **If you can help with a contribution of $3 or more right now, here 's the best link: [pauldavis.com/donate](https://act.myngp.com/el/LtfgnT1e6fiO2UfW4Ac2-875ltPSZmlnP2hPymuw-TU=/BXZ34HsIHvj7CLK-oVNiFvEP_huWaXDd336HaKR398E=?gpsid=13_36_1737&refcode=em18_180629_EOQmem_fnd_gq_Resend__KG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180629_EOQmem_fnd_gq_Resend__KG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)**

Contributions or gifts are not tax deductible. Contributions from foreign nationals and corporations are prohibited. Federal election law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
---

Paul Davis for Congress
PO Box 944
Lawrence KS 66044 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/LtfgnT1e6fiO2UfW4Ac2-875ltPSZmlnP2hPymuw-TU=/ZMqoe7QXXsUkZy_F-s8vlePRngrlD-6p4Edd2QGz54Y=).

Peter,

Since the day he entered this race, Republican Rep. Mike Braun has **misrepresented his business practices** in an effort to **cover up the shameful way he treated** his own employees.
* **_He made himself rich by selling foreign-made auto parts at the expense of Hoosier workers_**
* **_All while cheating his employees out of the paychecks they earned_**
* **_And racking up more than 250 citations for violating workplace safety rules_**

Hoosiers who know the truth about Rep. Braun don't want him anywhere near the Senate. **But Rep. And to make matters worse, **the first end-of-quarter deadline of the general election is TOMORROW** , and Rep. Braun's next fundraising report is expected to be huge. Friend,

This headline pretty much sums up Republican leaders in the General Assembly: [](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203a4f/2fde7c66/46fab52f/15682c0a/3911487991/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/180626-cooper-juneeoq18?gpsid=8_43_1752&refcode=em18_180629_eoq3_fnd_gq_ful__TC_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180629_eoq3_fnd_gq_ful__TC_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&utm_content=2") Last month, 20,000 teachers marched on Raleigh to demand more respect from the legislature.

name: Team Klobuchar
subject: What you do right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

This election isn't just about what we're fighting against. It's about what we're fighting _for._

An economy that works for everyone and leaves no one behind. Taking on the pharmaceutical lobby and getting families relief from high prescription drug costs. Meaningful action to address climate change. Making sure higher education -- from college to community college to apprenticeship programs -- is accessible for everyone.

Amy is fighting for progress on each one of these issues and many more. But this November, Minnesotans decide who serves in both U.S. Senate seats, all the seats in the U.S. House and the Minnesota House -- and elect a new governor, too!

**With so much on the line, what you do right now will make all the difference in November.**

**Will you make a contribution to reelect Amy to the U.S. Senate so she can keep pushing for the things that matter most to Minnesotans?**

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Tracy Newman, Team Inslee
subject: So here's where we're at
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Jay is counting on friends like you to support this country's progressive leaders.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78ec5/2f5ea88d/7036d403/2cbc1faa/3242986633/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/end-of-june-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-06-29_eom-3&refcode=ema_2018-06-29_eom-3&utm_campaign=eom-3&utm_medium=ema") [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78ec5/2f5ea88d/7036d403/2cbc1faa/3242986633/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/end-of-june-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-06-29_eom-3&refcode=ema_2018-06-29_eom-3&utm_campaign=eom-3&utm_medium=ema") Friend -- we're closing in on our $25,000 goal -- but we're not there yet. The past month is proof that we need strong progressive leaders to have the backing of proud supporters. We've seen Trump try to strip health care from those with pre-existing conditions, defund Planned Parenthood, and tear apart the families of peaceful asylum-seekers at our borders. With the recent Supreme Court decisions, our immigrant families are in danger, and our voting rights and reproductive freedoms are on the line. And following Justice Kennedy's retirement, who knows which extreme right-wing judge Trump will appoint. We need to grow Governor Inslee's ability to show progressive strength in the face of these unprecedented challenges -- and we need to do it now. Our team has an ambitious goal of $25,000 by midnight tomorrow. Jay is counting on friends like you to support this country's progressive leaders. Don't let him down -- we need you to chip in now. [**Can you send in a donation right away to make sure we hit our goal before our end-of-month deadline tomorrow?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78ec5/2f5ea88d/7036d403/2cbc1faa/3242986633/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/end-of-june-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-06-29_eom-3&refcode=ema_2018-06-29_eom-3&utm_campaign=eom-3&utm_medium=ema") | **Your Team Inslee Status**

**Email Address:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**2018 Team Inslee Donation:** Incomplete **Suggested Action:** [**Donate $5**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78ec5/2f5ea88d/7036d403/2cbc1faa/3242986633/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/end-of-june-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-06-29_eom-3&refcode=ema_2018-06-29_eom-3&utm_campaign=eom-3&utm_medium=ema")
---
With so much at stake, we must have the resources to take on the Trump administration and lead the country in progressive legislation. And we need you on our side.
Thanks for stepping up,
Tracy Newman
[CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78ec5/2f5ea88d/7036d403/2cbc1faa/3242986633/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/end-of-june-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-06-29_eom-3&refcode=ema_2018-06-29_eom-3&utm_campaign=eom-3&utm_medium=ema")

name: Heather Coil, AustinPetersen.com
subject: Less than 48 hours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Hi Friend, I promise to keep this short. There are less than 48 hours left to reach our enormous goal of 1,500 online donors by June 30th. We are on pace to reach that goal, but if we can’t find AT LEAST 60 more donors today, we will fall behind. Not enough people have stepped up to donate yet. Austin is burning up the phones, but he can’t call everyone. He needs your help. We need AT LEAST 60 people to step up today with a donation of $20.18 or more. Friend, I am specifically asking you for your help. [**Please click here to donate $20.18, $50, $100 or whatever you can afford >>>**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.anedot.com%2Faustinpetersen%2Fdonate_tb_today%3Futm_campaign%3D062918_fr%26source_code%3Demail%26email%3Ddpwillis67%40gmail.com%26first_name%3D%26last_name%3D%26street%3D%26zip%3D%26city%3D%26state%3D%26employer%3D%26occupation%3D%26phone%3D&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=062918_fr&n=1) Remember, this is a super important fundraising deadline. It is the last time Austin will submit a report to the FEC before the August primary. Which means we MUST show strong numbers so the media will report we are ready to take down Josh Hawley. [**Friend, Austin is counting on your help this month. Please chip in anything you can afford.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.anedot.com%2Faustinpetersen%2Fdonate_tb_today%3Futm_campaign%3D062918_fr%26source_code%3Demail%26email%3Ddpwillis67%40gmail.com%26first_name%3D%26last_name%3D%26street%3D%26zip%3D%26city%3D%26state%3D%26employer%3D%26occupation%3D%26phone%3D&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=062918_fr&n=2) Thank you. Heather Coil
Communications Director
Austin Petersen for U.S. Senate

clean_body: | Hi Friend, I promise to keep this short. There are less than 48 hours left to reach our enormous goal of 1,500 online donors by June 30th. We are on pace to reach that goal, but if we can’t find AT LEAST 60 more donors today, we will fall behind. Not enough people have stepped up to donate yet. Austin is burning up the phones, but he can’t call everyone. He needs your help. We need AT LEAST 60 people to step up today with a donation of $20.18 or more. Friend, I am specifically asking you for your help. Remember, this is a super important fundraising deadline. It is the last time Austin will submit a report to the FEC before the August primary. Which means we MUST show strong numbers so the media will report we are ready to take down Josh Hawley. Thank you. Heather Coil Communications Director Austin Petersen for U.S. Senate Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate ()

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Need your help, Koch group attacking me
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | We can't let this go, team. The Koch-backed group Americans for Prosperity is running ads against me. **I am relying on you to respond -- and quickly.** [**_We only have another 24 hours to reach our $30,000 FEC goal. Can you give?_**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f3d/622b7b5b/1b871578/307b9f4f/2689201741/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180629?refcode=dwse180629_m&recurring=true&amount=5") The Kochs don't like me for the same reasons President Trump and his Republican allies in Congress don't like me -- I speak out for what I believe in. I don't let Republicans in Washington get away with handing tax breaks to billionaires, defunding Planned Parenthood, or any number of anti-middle class moves. The Kochs can attack me all they like. It won't change my advocacy for the families of South Florida. To me, it's just a sign -- if they're willing to spend money attacking me, then I must be doing something right. But those attacks can't go unanswered. We need a strong grassroots response. And for that, I need you. [**_So if you can, give $5 or more in the next 24 hours._**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f3d/622b7b5b/1b871578/307b9f4f/2689201741/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180629?refcode=dwse180629_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Thank you for your help today. I truly appreciate all you do to make this team stronger. Debbie
---

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).

Debbie | | | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress

subject: Fwd: Mary has my support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mary Barzee Flores for Congress
body:
| | | Thank you, Khizr Khan, for your support of Mary! Make sure you take a moment to read the email he sent today. [Join Gold Star father Khizr Khan in his support of Mary with a $12 donation today. This will help us hit our important second-quarter goal.](https://act.myngp.com/el/p25iqKUMB9NhePVMWOxVhiQoEEBLhHYqmHMYOtOxGE8=/lWF65zyLsQOkpnrhA_kZ7SOd5gdGxGFo3ifUKsv5scc=?refcode=180629-email-pm&amount=12) Thank you,
Barzee for Congress **\--- Original Message ---** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/p25iqKUMB9NhePVMWOxVhiQoEEBLhHYqmHMYOtOxGE8=/oD1HDYnOXXmzyR6Jsz0lemmmDc_EV-LWxlRunWw64WE=?refcode=180629-email-pm) I know a leader when I see one. Mary Barzee Flores is a leader, and she's got the experience and policies to back it up. **[I'm proud to endorse Mary Barzee Flores for Congress. Can you join me in my support of her campaign with a $20 donation?](https://act.myngp.com/el/p25iqKUMB9NhePVMWOxVhiQoEEBLhHYqmHMYOtOxGE8=/lWF65zyLsQOkpnrhA_kZ7SOd5gdGxGFo3ifUKsv5scc=?refcode=180629-email-pm&amount=20)** Mary has had a long career fighting for justice and equality. She began her career in the Office of Public Defender in Miami, where she worked for 12 years. Later, she was nominated by President Obama for a judgeship on the U.S. District Court in the Southern District of Florida. She was denied the appointment because of partisan politics. **[In her time as a judge, she was known for her tough but fair reputation. Tough but fair would go a long way in our divided and unruly Congress right now. Help me get Mary to Washington with a $20 donation.](https://act.myngp.com/el/p25iqKUMB9NhePVMWOxVhiQoEEBLhHYqmHMYOtOxGE8=/lWF65zyLsQOkpnrhA_kZ7SOd5gdGxGFo3ifUKsv5scc=?refcode=180629-email-pm&amount=20)** Mary has a tough road ahead of her and she needs our help. We need to rally around her as she prepares for the general election in November against Mario Diaz-Balart, who has put his political agenda before FL-25 for far too long. It's time to flip this district from red to blue! _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [Express Donate: $5](https://act.myngp.com/el/p25iqKUMB9NhePVMWOxVhiQoEEBLhHYqmHMYOtOxGE8=/oD1HDYnOXXmzyR6Jsz0lemmmDc_EV-LWxlRunWw64WE=?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=180629-email-pm) [Express Donate: $10](https://act.myngp.com/el/p25iqKUMB9NhePVMWOxVhiQoEEBLhHYqmHMYOtOxGE8=/oD1HDYnOXXmzyR6Jsz0lemmmDc_EV-LWxlRunWw64WE=?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=180629-email-pm) [Express Donate: $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/p25iqKUMB9NhePVMWOxVhiQoEEBLhHYqmHMYOtOxGE8=/oD1HDYnOXXmzyR6Jsz0lemmmDc_EV-LWxlRunWw64WE=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=180629-email-pm) [Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/p25iqKUMB9NhePVMWOxVhiQoEEBLhHYqmHMYOtOxGE8=/oD1HDYnOXXmzyR6Jsz0lemmmDc_EV-LWxlRunWw64WE=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=180629-email-pm) [Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/p25iqKUMB9NhePVMWOxVhiQoEEBLhHYqmHMYOtOxGE8=/oD1HDYnOXXmzyR6Jsz0lemmmDc_EV-LWxlRunWw64WE=?express_lane=true&refcode=180629-email-pm) Thank you,
Khizr Khan
Gold Star Father | Paid for by Mary Barzee Flores for Congress

| _**Additional Insight Into the Final Days of the Special Session**_ A few days ago Governor Phil Scott [released a statemen](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=75094d85d4&e=19cebfe173)[t ](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=65138d43da&e=19cebfe173)about the Legislature’s latest budget and his decision to allow it to become law without his signature. What you might not have seen, or heard, is the perception of those who work in the State House. So we thought it was important to share some of those first-hand observations.

Below are some excerpts from three House members who were there as House and Senate leadership blocked two attempts at a compromise that would have kept state government open and your property taxes level.

While the legislative process isn’t fun to follow during the first few days of summer, we think it’s crucial Vermonters know and understand the political gamesmanship that occured while the Governor was fighting for your pocketbook. *** ** Rep. Linda Joy Sullivan (Democrat from Dorset):**

“What was hardest to swallow was how hard a number of my colleagues worked at coming up with a compromise to break the impasse, only to have the work abandoned at the last minute by leadership — primarily, in most everyone's view ... to increase the legislature's supposed 'leverage' over the Governor.

“A deal was struck. Literally, I am told, there was a handshake. However, it took only a few hours for the House to abandon entirely its deal with the Governor, apparently at the adamant insistence of the Senate president pro tempore. By mid-afternoon, again we achieved a compromise between House Republicans, Democrats and Progressives. Yet, to everyone's surprise, while we were seated and preparing to vote, we were told ... that the second compromise of the day was also not acceptable to the Senate president pro tempore. With no debate of any substance, my colleagues took their lead from legislative leadership and erased their work...'Legislative leverage' was the order of the day. In the process, 'transparency' apparently became inexpedient.

“The legislature is a hard place to work — the hours are long, the demands many, the compensation little. I have been chagrined this year to hear announcement after announcement by a number of my colleagues — decent, strong, well-meaning legislators — that they had determined not to seek re-election. Each had deeply personal reasons, to be sure. I cannot but wonder, nonetheless, whether the predominance of partisan pressure on individual members and the use of sometimes questionable tactics doesn't extract a huge toll.” [(Read the full op-ed here)](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=fc913766ff&e=19cebfe173)

**Rep. Anne Donahue (Republican from Northfield):**

“Behind closed doors, leadership of the Senate was objecting to the terms of the agreement between the House Speaker (Mitzi Johnson) and the Governor and demanding that the Speaker back out of it. So she did. She backed out of her agreement.

“When an amendment was offered on the House floor to restore the language of the 3-way split compromise, they stood to oppose it, raising philosophical objections to the concept: the very concept that they had proposed to their committees just a few hours earlier.

“When a stunned member of the committee asked for a brief recess to discuss this with his chair, the Speaker refused. In my 16 years in the House, this is the first time I have ever seen any Speaker refuse a request for a brief recess.

“Disgusted by having had two agreements broken, some dozen or so Republicans were determined to not allow the process to continue, hoping that if the vote were deferred to Monday, cooler heads could prevail. Loss of the quorum would achieve that; they began leaving their seats.

“The Speaker, seeing what was happening, rushed into the final vote, catching members off guard before anyone could ask if there was a quorum. (There was not – but if it is not challenged, it is presumed to exist.)” [(Read the full op-ed here)](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=44faa9249a&e=19cebfe173)

**Rep. Heidi Scheuermann (Republican from Stowe):**

“As things progressed through these last weeks, I remained hopeful that House leadership would finally sit down with the governor to negotiate a compromise.

“And, last Friday it looked like that happened. Unfortunately, while the day started out with a bipartisan deal on the budget and property taxes reached among the Governor, House Democrats, and House Republicans, it ended in what can be described as D.C.-style political gamesmanship, with the House Democratic majority pulling the plug on not just that initial deal, but then on a second one that was, in fact, proposed and advocated for by them, and had received unanimous votes in both House money committees.

“As the hours passed, though, the House majority, including the chairs of the appropriations and ways and means committees came up with another deal... Lo and behold, however, in another stunning reversal, the majority pulled the plug on that deal as well, and proceeded with, essentially, the Senate-passed budget.

“Finally, when I proposed an amendment on the House floor to stick with that second compromise, the response from leadership was as disingenuous and hypocritical as I have seen in all my years in the House. Picture it: the respected chairs of the House money committees trying to explain their current opposition to the deal that they proposed and shepherded to unanimous votes in their committees. It was a shameful display.” [(Read the full op-ed here)](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=a9c5aa1489&e=19cebfe173) ###

---

name: Team Morse
subject: Did you see Elizabeth Warren's note?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
Team, just making sure you saw Senator Elizabeth Warren's note from yesterday--we're so proud to have her support in this race.
Once you've read it, [_**can you make sure to chip in to help us hit tomorrow 's critical quarterly fundraising goal?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/jIc_nezK_S0IWUZoWbKVGb968XvAL0agvD-z4r46twY=/ROpJgaP1Oc4aKjqpMx0Rp9-_QNCEfByq4bW3UBvaR0w=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180629_TM_jmeoq2_all_l1)
Thank you,
Team Morse

\-----Forwarded message-----
From: Elizabeth Warren
Date: Thurs, June 28
Subject: why I'm fighting for Jessica Morse
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/jIc_nezK_S0IWUZoWbKVGb968XvAL0agvD-z4r46twY=/Uu_wxy6cBQiej54GVU7P2uy8BFuWIfQb_1bZmIYyG_M=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180629_TM_jmeoq2_all_logo)
Team, I'm carving out time to send this quick note because there's so much at stake this election. If we're going to get this country back on track, we need to flip districts like California's 4th and elect more public servants like Jessica Morse.
**Jessica Morse is a candidate I believe in, because she 's not afraid to stick her neck out to fight for working people.** She's committed to listening to the real problems facing Americans, and she's centered her campaign around a vision of accessible, high-quality health care, affordable higher education, and an economy that benefits everyday Americans--not just the special interests.
**I can 't wait to fight alongside Jessica in Congress. Saturday's quarterly fundraising deadline is about laying the groundwork for victory in November, and Jessica needs her supporters to step up. Can you chip in now to help?**
[$15 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/jIc_nezK_S0IWUZoWbKVGb968XvAL0agvD-z4r46twY=/Uu_wxy6cBQiej54GVU7P2uy8BFuWIfQb_1bZmIYyG_M=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180629_TM_jmeoq2_all_15&amount=15) | [$25 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/jIc_nezK_S0IWUZoWbKVGb968XvAL0agvD-z4r46twY=/Uu_wxy6cBQiej54GVU7P2uy8BFuWIfQb_1bZmIYyG_M=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180629_TM_jmeoq2_all_25&amount=25)
---|---
[$50 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/jIc_nezK_S0IWUZoWbKVGb968XvAL0agvD-z4r46twY=/Uu_wxy6cBQiej54GVU7P2uy8BFuWIfQb_1bZmIYyG_M=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180629_TM_jmeoq2_all_50&amount=50) | [$100 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/jIc_nezK_S0IWUZoWbKVGb968XvAL0agvD-z4r46twY=/Uu_wxy6cBQiej54GVU7P2uy8BFuWIfQb_1bZmIYyG_M=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180629_TM_jmeoq2_all_100&amount=100)
[$250 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/jIc_nezK_S0IWUZoWbKVGb968XvAL0agvD-z4r46twY=/Uu_wxy6cBQiej54GVU7P2uy8BFuWIfQb_1bZmIYyG_M=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180629_TM_jmeoq2_all_250&amount=250) | [Other >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/jIc_nezK_S0IWUZoWbKVGb968XvAL0agvD-z4r46twY=/Uu_wxy6cBQiej54GVU7P2uy8BFuWIfQb_1bZmIYyG_M=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180629_TM_jmeoq2_all_other)

Jessica's opponent in this race is a Republican whose record shows that he's there to serve special interests, not his constituents.
Last winter, he voted to give billionaires and lobbyists a trillion-dollar tax cut, blowing a hole in the budget that Republicans want to fill by gutting Medicare and Social Security. He's also voted to strip healthcare from millions of Americans of all ages--including almost 300,000 of his own constituents with pre-existing conditions.
**That 's not public service. That's a knife in the back of working families across California and across our nation.** Fighting back starts with electing independent leaders and true public servants like Jessica Morse to Congress.
The other side will do absolutely all they can to keep seats like this one--we're seeing that play out across the country. The best way to make sure Jessica can fight back is to help her team hit this vital fundraising goal.
[_**Can you chip in now to help the team pull it off?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/jIc_nezK_S0IWUZoWbKVGb968XvAL0agvD-z4r46twY=/Uu_wxy6cBQiej54GVU7P2uy8BFuWIfQb_1bZmIYyG_M=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180629_TM_jmeoq2_all_l2)
Thank you,
Elizabeth Warren
[CONTRIBUTE >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/jIc_nezK_S0IWUZoWbKVGb968XvAL0agvD-z4r46twY=/Uu_wxy6cBQiej54GVU7P2uy8BFuWIfQb_1bZmIYyG_M=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180629_TM_jmeoq2_all_contribbutton)

name: Kathy Manning
subject: Only one obstacle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | This month has been a whirlwind for us -- in the best way. When I first launched this campaign, no one thought we could bring down entrenched, special interest funded Congressman Ted Budd. Then we started gaining momentum and people across North Carolina -- and the country -- took notice. This month alone, we:
* _Hosted dozens of events from Lexington to Greensboro to Mooresville talking to voters and listening to what keeps them up at night._
* _Kicked off our summer organizing efforts of registering voters, knocking doors, and making phone calls to voters._
* _Brought on a new class of more than 30 inspiring young men and women as campaign fellows, bringing energy to this campaign with every door knocked and call made._
* _Received more incredible endorsements, including from**Governor Roy Cooper** and **League of Conservation Voters Action Fund.**_
* _Continued to make local, state, and national news outlets as one of the most competitive U.S. House races in the country._

It's the highs like these that make this campaign feel unstoppable. But one thing could stop us -- not having the resources we need. The way we keep this from happening and make this month a huge success is: **Reach our $50,000 FEC goal before the deadline in less than 36 hours!** [**We're about $15,436.50 away from achieving that. Can you rush in a few dollars to help us close the gap?**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542786d/e3b7d3/5c89d745/2555e0bc/598729000/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180629?refcode=kme180629_m") | | | [Donate](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542786d/e3b7d3/5c89d745/2555e0bc/598729000/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180629?refcode=kme180629_m")
---
The whirlwind's not over yet. We have four months to take this tight race and turn it into a resounding victory. This race could determine control of the U.S. House of Representatives. But as long as we continue to work together, hit goals, and keep the momentum in our favor, we can get this done.
Help us put this FEC deadline in the books. Give $5 or more.
Thank you.
Kathy Manning
| _Kathy Manning is a proud advocate for the families of North Carolina. To her, the cause of making health care more affordable and accessible isn't political -- it's personal. She relies on your contributions to be elected._ | | [Donate](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542786d/e3b7d3/5c89d745/2555e0bc/598729000/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180629?refcode=kme180629_m")
---

|
---

---

name: Leah Vukmir
subject: BREAKING: Supreme Court Retirement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
Confirming a Supreme Court justice is arguably the most important thing any senator will ever do.

Friend,

Confirming a Supreme Court justice is arguably the most important thing any senator will ever do.

The announcement that Justice Anthony Kennedy will be retiring calls attention to that once again.

As your senator, I can promise you this, I will stand for conservative justices on the court, and I will do everything in my power to block liberals from the court.

Right now, with Tammy Baldwin as our senator, that is NOT the case.

Which is why I’m asking you to stand with me today.

If you feel as I do, that we need justices who will uphold our Constitution on the court, then I’m asking you to sign my petition to Tammy telling her just that: **[https://leahvukmir.com/supreme-court/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=14cd0b0902b543e18ba4058a04e7666f&_e=TO_0VIefA1CUUIJwn37u_FS9iK7EDi6_W319QpK1KHshYWhSfduGByCneg_8NNAVYD7SUNe0d-Vmr308oR-yqEn4jHyZroiGGmE_oSsXacSz4ixOR2rmB4vlmIgW-HmG2xVs3BRi6kq9vvwl4TyNqc5jzDH70euW46khg5nMkeK_shzlj--umk8w7Dr0-ihDxwzP_KxF9h3CXpz0Yer8zC_J7_BCRJdxKt6iq_-tgA7gu35X7Ng6x6G2vq69M_h-yU35CFqf6VdfkF1-aPpDcl_Kn01uv2rlQT5VTOxU0vh1xHYgdHVtbVn8rS5kJn_ilpWeQ7x4yOqZRsl9gKANXf_17LOufct0QMY_x3lRcmVrNsUpiJ3X5gN9s_4_frhAP1HHdfRGmXIT0-B3BvBfN5MhQxmIerivFupyJLoHxbc%3D)**

As I said before, this is the single greatest role of a senator, and we must have our conservative voices heard.

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=14cd0b0902b543e18ba4058a04e7666f&_e=qE17R9qTp2ae3vh5NoWSAof7WiYHhqpRyddi8XvxhteqpRzjGM2BxjaIM3RpXTiKZN6826YDQgMc6V0dlt3s_EDgiiAEfPQCRESezzbU35_sh605zGwDDwXE25euYlGOkqL0xwYNpdruk5iY6uW2CxAbGXedXxrHEyYz9FtycMsww73pCxhXi5WiD53n3vb2LwqwANXaSy-4rQz_7N1bHrX5oEBuEg_a7gCWAYiuJujIMQ9b2-cGCYu4stWw5RDE). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=14cd0b0902b543e18ba4058a04e7666f&_e=TO_0VIefA1CUUIJwn37u_AxYRKrwW9Ta4f-wJqPKK9On567U9m5iVqyfJizymwZvXQSdjlQAtP9UtvORsUEQFPjdjHHjJnVg00n3JZFfejzOB4oAMo0OdD8qKTv51TJhGBSpKv2PR-8KlAEAYLRPRSeueuIHbKIonvYlTiaaTqqIXQaZPPqtmawQlTNrEOA1PJntjzO6lrQF7UtF_x1Je8_LFazHGX9lBUzA7KhAlgow1DrU4kYGbGlymznMXKBQQ8HBfmplB425hfbEwa3iAe0BGbNVsNliCBWH9H6yqsVbxAOeK1_1x6yDfpgmxeYpm6AugJLjCB5d-jOVqfMkqqCMuzrC6VB-VyvwErTs9UMFBKWtJ6aYzU1pd3SlWZr1) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=14cd0b0902b543e18ba4058a04e7666f&_e=TO_0VIefA1CUUIJwn37u_AxYRKrwW9Ta4f-wJqPKK9PN4VmrA9c0VhL2b-jS8GPAunYtnC93vvHGAeOJnKH62vrkFziESQIuZckCsdQy5m66hm1mtFjIg8Tobmm13TrsViiBm21rqRnyuP6yt6LijmjyY1JY-qt4XBdIDc6V43C9q8u6xOqjtWi44cE6gNxGzd3BB5Zo_xZupsFiICV1xd6rBgGiHwUVZG8sIg5n-6lk5a3tB6ZU4NG_v77yPw3r9CISJHXLyvz0Y_ZsBd-KxFSchaP_O0efwwilhXeZCE_EuRWa9bpPGhghmyVzhJwf5MMTFC_tJjl8cFiDoHFg3uQnJqI0zJBtILKVYPm-GmN6vEzwkiZbiZOaRC2vTg1-) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=14cd0b0902b543e18ba4058a04e7666f&_e=TO_0VIefA1CUUIJwn37u_HL21twP9teEsjXSCmyUUYnaWSHG-eFQK82nGgQzTQBQMs2WyeUqyiKJ3TlOS6bfMfvNvUNfyFmh-X09zneu5OuqLk1S8TwB91-Am8Po211jjBdj3iXWEayaOc91LnSilBe6_66p-ZevG-QWF5LS-RhhxYHqkqfKUj5OFE-L9pn4e1w627uDp_NmLg9_4UDqXtv5F3k_sOCOjPzypYCRh4pafqcTdEK_gkkpHwO6GwP1w0wnDpMDthC8-iZj3U7lpg%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=14cd0b0902b543e18ba4058a04e7666f&_e=TO_0VIefA1CUUIJwn37u_H5knr97CzTzYsqo4do8h2bQtDkqEQkFD2mQ7mutR6GanlyRTXmqiDZJpEfhQ5klbiIrQ--4P5OXG2x2XR0PpBkKTItiUo2pL_eBksRPIoS3NGMD6OFtdmXa_DG9l3U6DeteU45VT6l_Xi7QWefNq_dWgkNzKuDgwcyv9AGzqRg93T7aWMUihPHpEtx2WWSGIk6Lhyoy9v2vQ0Rq_51546sGNIe_QLSOnsQKN-3TVcuXoUmH-igdRy9AT8wPsF77cg%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=14cd0b0902b543e18ba4058a04e7666f&_e=TO_0VIefA1CUUIJwn37u_DdVpFDts6JD1NMfQ9KuOANNFnp5GHT8t5kmf0eMkMqdjwi98M1olrAhEEN5AYglKl3cQR1LnJrET1O1K90Ealisk26Ge75oTTi_bs57CX3spK9neh8PXulnMVjyii6iwQnnzw-hhx85gcGeAR1VKb6fn4uABBcREmrkAR3hLzjMLaNhbKFPypnAuCokx67U7cHMuFxGMyySc6nEgjiE8_o5zlpu752Rj4hJuCbph0PZmesm7TH8Qr-S4FQX2fblaA%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=14cd0b0902b543e18ba4058a04e7666f&_e=TO_0VIefA1CUUIJwn37u_AxYRKrwW9Ta4f-wJqPKK9NQ2PlM8No03crK7EQBuUkcdYXoqP8LVZSU_b_M54bJoDPnYqhfkJqtiCQOj1mPZ6-2sGnt-mSLhcVwJ904xUUTyPfPN20CWZ6y2iC4JoIfza815SxqBj0dP2GrdBBmsEfxY_UJoSE7-7_0G7R7nMd-rUUPgRpz9rtOgbI7U3VUA8x8re8Wx8Ht6YJReMje_izHR_BWHb0m9noEW_jXxzGkA--m1bKlJilCHkdYlWt_GhZWDbOyVt4GnRi36XuDvYSFG2v1vMQgP9yuUTRWtdf_WNSCPLi4nmpeSPKNFG3xb-pNyIN3i3N-v0GdFh12BpuQguYTj7ljRFYpLPmUC-h_9Xtx9Fb2q8cclX3pYzFDaA%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=14cd0b0902b543e18ba4058a04e7666f&_e=qE17R9qTp2ae3vh5NoWSAof7WiYHhqpRyddi8XvxhteqpRzjGM2BxjaIM3RpXTiKZN6826YDQgMc6V0dlt3s_EDgiiAEfPQCRESezzbU35_sh605zGwDDwXE25euYlGOkqL0xwYNpdruk5iY6uW2CxAbGXedXxrHEyYz9FtycMsww73pCxhXi5WiD53n3vb2LwqwANXaSy-4rQz_7N1bHrX5oEBuEg_a7gCWAYiuJujIMQ9b2-cGCYu4stWw5RDE) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=14cd0b0902b543e18ba4058a04e7666f&_e=qE17R9qTp2ae3vh5NoWSAof7WiYHhqpRyddi8XvxhteqpRzjGM2BxjaIM3RpXTiKZN6826YDQgMc6V0dlt3s_EDgiiAEfPQCRESezzbU35_sh605zGwDDwXE25euYlGOkqL0xwYNpdruk5iY6uW2CxAbGXedXxrHEyYz9FtycMsww73pCxhXi5WiD53n3vb2LwqwANXaSy-4rQz_7N1bHrX5oEBuEg_a7gCWAYiuJujIMQ9b2-cGCYu4stWw5RDE) to unsubscribe. clean_body: Confirming a Supreme Court justice is arguably the most important thing any senator will ever do. Friend, Confirming a Supreme Court justice is arguably the most important thing any senator will ever do. The announcement that Justice Anthony Kennedy will be retiring calls attention to that once again. As your senator, I can promise you this, I will stand for conservative justices on the court, and I will do everything in my power to block liberals from the court. Right now, with Tammy Baldwin as our senator, that is NOT the case. Which is why I’m asking you to stand with me today. If you feel as I do, that we need justices who will uphold our Constitution on the court, then I’m asking you to sign my petition to Tammy telling her just that: As I said before, this is the single greatest role of a senator, and we must have our conservative voices heard. Leah ** Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Tim Kaine
subject: A note about this important deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek,

[I'm writing to you because we're just one day away from a crucial deadline.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1250/3e0906/68f50f2c/3e35a508/1081647529/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180629_1_FR_TK_EOQ-TK-ldnd&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Irsquom+writing+to+you+because+wersquore&utm_campaign=20180629_1_FR_TK_EOQ-TK-ldnd&source=20180629_1_FR_TK_EOQ-TK-ldnd") [Tomorrow](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1250/3e0906/68f50f2c/3e35a50d/1081647529/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180629_1_FR_TK_EOQ-TK-ldnd&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Tomorrow&utm_campaign=20180629_1_FR_TK_EOQ-TK-ldnd&source=20180629_1_FR_TK_EOQ-TK-ldnd") marks the end of our campaign's first fundraising quarter during the general election.

Once we submit our public filing, everyone will be able to see how much support this campaign has - including our opponent.

I've written to you before about the importance of this election. The message our Commonwealth sends on Election Day will be heard around the nation. I want to make sure that message is one of optimism and opportunity, **that we really can create _a Virginia that works for all._**

[But in order for us to win up and down the ticket this November, we need to stay on track and reach our goal of raising $200,000 in grassroots donations from people just like you, Derek.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1250/3e0906/68f50f2c/3e35a50c/1081647529/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180629_1_FR_TK_EOQ-TK-ldnd&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+But+in+order+for+us+to+win+up+and+down+t&utm_campaign=20180629_1_FR_TK_EOQ-TK-ldnd&source=20180629_1_FR_TK_EOQ-TK-ldnd")

This is our biggest goal yet, but I have no doubt that we can reach it. You know that our vision for Virginia, and the country, sure is important.

If you can chip in before [tomorrow,](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1250/3e0906/68f50f2c/3e35a502/1081647529/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180629_1_FR_TK_EOQ-TK-ldnd&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+tomorrow&utm_campaign=20180629_1_FR_TK_EOQ-TK-ldnd&source=20180629_1_FR_TK_EOQ-TK-ldnd") I'd appreciate it so much: _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1250/3e0906/68f50f2c/3e35a500/1081647529/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180629_1_FR_TK_EOQ-TK-ldnd_5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20180629_1_FR_TK_EOQ-TK-ldnd&source=20180629_1_FR_TK_EOQ-TK-ldnd")

"" This is our biggest goal yet, but I have no doubt that we can reach it. You know that our vision for Virginia, and the country, sure is important. name: StaceyAbrams.com
subject: This time next month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
This time next month, we'll have our official Republican opponent. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaaeb/34a064cc/8c6b939/70f784f/4104195572/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=IE062818EOQ3&source=IE062818EOQ3")

| |
\----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | Friends - In May, we defied expectations by putting people first and building a diverse coalition of support that looks like Georgia. But that victory was only one step in a long journey towards making Stacey Abrams Georgia's next Governor. This time next month, we will have our official Republican opponent. We don't know who he'll be, but we already know he'll be out of touch with Georgia families and _extremely_ well-funded. **Stacey's first public fundraising deadline of the general election is tomorrow. Soon, we'll report not only how much we've raised but also how many individuals contributed and believe in our campaign. So if you're able:** **[Make a $3 donation before the deadline so we can come out of this strong and ready for whichever opponent we're up against.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaaeb/34a064cc/8c6b939/70f784c/4104195572/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwNjI5MThFT1EtYSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-eoq?refcode=IE062918EOQ-a&utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=2+-+Make+a+ask+donation+before+the+deadline+&utm_campaign=IE062818EOQ3&source=IE062818EOQ3")** We've got a lot of work to do between now and November. We need to share Stacey's bold vision for Georgia with every Georgian -- so they know that on Election Day, it will be worth it to get out and vote. It won't be easy, and it won't be cheap. But if our June fundraising numbers reflect the groundswell of support that our team has witnessed first hand, the whole world will know what we know -- _Stacey can win this._ **Make your donation at this link to have it count towards our fundraising deadline:** **[http://secure.staceyabrams.com/june_deadline](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaaeb/34a064cc/8c6b939/70f784d/4104195572/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwNjI5MThFT1EtYSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-eoq?refcode=IE062918EOQ-a&utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=3+-+httpsecurestaceyabramscomjunedeadline&utm_campaign=IE062818EOQ3&source=IE062818EOQ3")** Let's do this! \- Team Abrams
---

name: staff@floridadems.org
subject: [internal update] FEC report due tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
|
---
| Bumping this to the top of your inbox, team. It's no exaggeration to say that tomorrow's FEC report is the single most important report of this election.

**We need your support before our hard deadline at midnight in less than 48 hours. This FEC report is make-or-break for us.**

[**Click here to rush your contribution to the Florida Democratic Party.**](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-2018-fec-deadline-q2?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+Click+here+to+rush+your+contribution+to+&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180629_2_5&source=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180629_2_5&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180629_2_5")

**Begin forwarded message:**

**DEADLINE ALERT: June 30th is the Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline that could spell defeat for Rick Scott 's campaign for US Senate**

We've noticed you haven't given yet this year, but we explain below why your donation will make a major impact right now.

Read more below on how Florida Democrats are working to defeat Rick Scott, or [**click here to contribute $5 or more now to help us reach our FEC goal before our Saturday deadline ->**](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-2018-fec-deadline-q2?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+click+here+to+contribute+5+or+more+now+t&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180629_2_5&source=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180629_2_5&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180629_2_5")
* * *
Rick Scott is on a spending spree.

**He 's already spent almost $20 million on ads, and we're in ACTION MODE here at headquarters.**

Floridians can't afford more Rick Scott anywhere, let alone in the Senate. And if Scott defeats Bill Nelson this November, that means it will be NEARLY IMPOSSIBLE for Democrats to retake the Senate this year.

[**That 's why we're rapidly expanding our grassroots advocacy, ad campaigns, and hiring. But we need to hit our $50,000 goal before midnight Saturday so we have our biggest FEC report yet. Will you contribute now to help power our grassroots work?**](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-2018-fec-deadline-q2?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+Thatrsquos+why+wersquore+rapidly+expandi&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180629_2_5&source=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180629_2_5&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180629_2_5") [](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-2018-fec-deadline-q2?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180629_2_5&source=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180629_2_5&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180629_2_5") We need to bring $50,000 in the door by our FEC deadline because we'll be publicly reporting our fundraising numbers afterward. This is the report Rick Scott, Republicans, and the media will scour to determine if we have what it takes to win up and down the ballot this year.

Florida's Senate seat is THE most competitive in the country. We can't risk showing ANY weakness in this FEC report.

**[Can you rush $5 now to help us reach our new fundraising goal before Saturday's FEC deadline?](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-2018-fec-deadline-q2?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=5+-+Can+you+rush+ask+now+to+help+us+reach+ou&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180629_2_5&source=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180629_2_5&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180629_2_5")** __**Democrats are depending on you.** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a link below. Otherwise, you will be redirected to a donation page.__ **[Donate $5 now!](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-2018-fec-deadline-q2?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode2=exllinks&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=6+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180629_2_5&source=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180629_2_5&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180629_2_5")
[Donate $25 now!](http://act.floridadems. [Donate $50 now!](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-2018-fec-deadline-q2?amount=50&express_lane=true&refcode2=exllinks&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=8+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180629_2_5&source=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180629_2_5&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180629_2_5")
[Donate $100 now!](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-2018-fec-deadline-q2?amount=100&express_lane=true&refcode2=exllinks&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=9+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180629_2_5&source=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180629_2_5&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180629_2_5")
[Or donate another amount.](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-2018-fec-deadline-q2?amount=5&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=10+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180629_2_5&source=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180629_2_5&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180629_2_5")** Rick Scott's priority if elected to the Senate?

**Voting the way Donald Trump demands.**

That means gutting affordable, accessible health care. Slashing Medicare and Social Security. Ending environmental protections.

Denying climate change. Using federal laws for voter suppression. Rewarding his wealthy buddies with massive tax cuts. Putting special interests first.

Rick Scott has been wrong for Florida for seven years -- and he's wrong to represent Florida in the US Senate.

_Rick Scott is dumping millions of his own money into the race to defend his failed record. That is why we 've got to hit our updated budget goals and make this our strongest FEC report yet._

[**Can you click here and donate directly to help Florida Democrats defeat Rick Scott before our FEC deadline?**](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-2018-fec-deadline-q2?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=11+-+Can+you+click+here+and+donate+directly+t&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180629_2_5&source=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180629_2_5&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180629_2_5")

Thanks for your support. We know that together we can stop Rick Scott once and for all.

-- Florida Democrats _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _

| |

"" "" "" "" "" Rick Scott's priority if elected to the Senate? Voting the way Donald Trump demands.** That means gutting affordable, accessible health care. Slashing Medicare and Social Security. Ending environmental protections. Denying climate change. Using federal laws for voter suppression. Rewarding his wealthy buddies with massive tax cuts. Putting special interests first. Rick Scott has been wrong for Florida for seven years -- and he's wrong to represent Florida in the US Senate. Rick Scott is dumping millions of his own money into the race to defend his failed record. That is why we 've got to hit our updated budget goals and make this our strongest FEC report yet. "" Thanks for your support. We know that together we can stop Rick Scott once and for all. -- Florida Democrats | | We believe that emails are a vital way for the campaign to stay in direct contact with supporters. "" Thanks for your support of Florida Democrats! Paid for by Florida Democratic Party. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee Copyright Florida Democratic Party, All rights reserved.

name: Martin Sheen
subject: Note from a former president
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter. I'm Martin Sheen. I may not be a real-life President, but there are three things I've learned about real-life politics. First: What's happening right now in America is not normal. The rhetoric coming from Washington is hateful and in opposition to the values of inclusion and equality America was built on. Second: To protect the principles we care so deeply about from the extremely partisan atmosphere -- like access to health care, a secure retirement, or investments in education or infrastructure -- we need to keep good lawmakers in place. **Senator Sherrod Brown is one of those lawmakers.** He doesn't just talk about progressive values; he embodies them. He fights for them. He's an authentic leader. Third: **We need to step up.** Never doubt that a group of concerned citizens, however small, can make a big difference. [**Peter, I'm asking you to help Sherrod. His FEC deadline is tomorrow at midnight, and he needs to reach $600,000. Can you give $5, $10, or more to help him reach that goal?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff982/4462dc26/572a4b5b/2007a46e/1180906062/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjI5bXMiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180629ms?refcode=sbe180629ms_m_other&refcode2=3268183") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff982/4462dc26/572a4b5b/2007a46d/1180906062/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjI5bXMiLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180629ms?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe180629ms_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff982/4462dc26/572a4b5b/2007a46d/1180906062/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjI5bXMiLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180629ms?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe180629ms_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff982/4462dc26/572a4b5b/2007a46d/1180906062/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjI5bXMiLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180629ms?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180629ms_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff982/4462dc26/572a4b5b/2007a46e/1180906062/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjI5bXMiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180629ms?refcode=sbe180629ms_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** I've played a lot of roles in my career. A Captain in the Vietnam War. The uncle of a young superhero. A liberal U.S. President battling an opposition Congress. But in real life, I'm a guy from Ohio. I was born in Dayton. My mom was an Irish immigrant and my dad was a factory worker and machine inspector. **Sherrod is one of those rare lawmakers that lives up to the trust we place in him as an elected official.** He puts Ohio families first, last, and always. That's the guy I want representing my family in the Senate. [**Sherrod is facing tough resistance from right-wing special interest groups -- the Koch network plans to spend $400 million on the midterm elections. President Trump and Vice President Mike Pence threw their support behind Sherrod's opponent. If you can, chip in to help Sherrod hit his goal right now.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff982/4462dc26/572a4b5b/2007a46e/1180906062/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjI5bXMiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180629ms?refcode=sbe180629ms_m_other&refcode2=3268183") All the best, and thanks for helping Sherrod. Martin

name: Bob (personal)
subject: can you help today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e61c7/51dbcc2a/1b2fcf5a/3a4e5d3/2017764784/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")
Let's get one thing out of the way, right now: I believe that Mitch McConnell set a precedent in 2016 and that he is obligated to follow it now -- we should not vote on the next Supreme Court justice until the new Senate is seated after November's election.

My opponent, the far-right and the Republican establishment will certainly attack me for it. They're going to pour money into this race, trying to flip this seat so they can get another vote for whatever conservative ideologue President Trump nominates. **I need your help to fight back -- can you make a donation to support my campaign today?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180629_fr2_nd_rem&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")** **[Donate $25 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180629_fr2_nd_rem&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")** **[Donate $50 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180629_fr2_nd_rem&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")** **[Or click here to donate another amount](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180629_fr2_nd_rem&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Voting rights, workers' rights, LGBT rights, the Affordable Care Act -- there's so much on the line. We need to rally around every single Senator who can ensure that the next Supreme Court justice will put the Constitution and the American people before corporate special interests.

There's a major fundraising timeline coming up on Saturday, and it is critical that we show our strength by posting a strong report that demonstrates that Pennsylvanians will not back down from this fight. **_[Can you make a $5 donation right now to show the GOP where you stand?](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180629_fr2_nd_rem&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

This will be the fight of a lifetime, team, and I'm honored to have you by my side.

Bob

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180629_fr2_nd_rem&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Mike Thompson
subject: 24 hours
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
Peter--We're about 24 hours out from our June FEC filing deadline.

Since deep-pocketed **GOP groups began funneling tens of millions of dollars** to discrediting Democrats across the country last month, this is our first chance to show that we are not letting their attacks go unchecked.

Let's get the truth out. You can use this special link to chip in right away: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thompson-june2018**](https://act.myngp.com/el/RdKuWDp0UxkhW5KnOitWobfK08IwfBE0mqAfHbjglmg=/t8WuwO3MhdkF71VZqumP8olcEFSk1toBcV7X5s83J0g=?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_180629_2_7&amount=25&recurring=true)

Thanks,

Mike
* * *
_Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He represents California 's 5th district in Congress, where he fights for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot continue to do his crucial work without the support of people like you. [**Consider making a donation of any amount now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/RdKuWDp0UxkhW5KnOitWobfK08IwfBE0mqAfHbjglmg=/yJeXW9HYCskrI6seNNMxzdqd233c76slk0b6bcBVkkI=?amount=25&recurring=true)_

Friend, we’re just 1 day away from one of the biggest tests our campaign has faced.

It’s our first END OF QUARTER fundraising deadline since we won the Republican Party of Wisconsin endorsement at last month’s convention, and as of this email, we are just short of reaching our goal.

We have $12,509 left to go.

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=3791148e780b4593bbcde1be2df5a17e&_e=fi9gocnDRii1-WeiCQhwFlvhzOy93L7Vt-baJy6brT1vIELN5qemmcO__PXidh1GWFuRchAXbVMzQnOqrAFXUR6r_2qfT21xPyiYVfu3ysQDznqjOsNEko4bX_3QNUWSZy74WGbhiAtxCiunOkKHYoZ6ygkqQSyvmcT-7pBuhZQ7X0hD5J6dtXQ75dhnbeyIZMm3YqY9iogjQ452x_32aQ-qGpxNPtMuWc8wCqlBoPYd7cdJ-X-zZnBy9dNOGcHT). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=3791148e780b4593bbcde1be2df5a17e&_e=rfoURImxCn7PQURrDUy1992Pfg0oaAUBPXKC_qjh8AJzdj2iJjeHlwZ01RAvje43rn1ZONjk4E9EcSUapONGw-Q6WiBbe_HGvW8GiSRHOdVSjynFXZggaOIkHi3-CrTuDFP4NVJgWfSLasQ8Qp07CwgZ4mTHH3-rcOaJIH2q1fRWxXET25w9kMNeLap-QKi3K5ftXuwt_lAHYKdh1JzGqsiYw5gGzQ598c-NI0OYwWPJVyaqMCRLZr5tyXHqTf8j_1PL5-opQzrUv4hmT-RkxeXp7fM0vdAhYJjEEkjIYRSb6dZwJOEa214sMlrQzqnbGeeTqQawogoEHuqblQAPxRqtvgtOi9fSLkMSHJoCNH4aMlKNF-5Pz28DjNTQasKv) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=3791148e780b4593bbcde1be2df5a17e&_e=rfoURImxCn7PQURrDUy1992Pfg0oaAUBPXKC_qjh8AJfe7QMqJ-OplGQplxjp2tjSfR-vS_kLP171vZxf0vvAP0xCrY_tGMoOmxe1z9xta_hbVQ5rCxd6V4x3vhdEIJXbj9LCciR5_PNcu7BknCLzrKHPTL85OvwEho_6R8vfa4qKLvn0lVkrhoMCkayFwtvv6WFWLnMRv4JxjHeV7eIKbt9w13vSEUnBbeesNmJA671wnAw3lOkTtLcVYL3hAaWeDwG0zSzdmM_5tjxKu_NdH2MuPtkegXwHqW32stg8m-H9gjgnJBzWKJty_qescUAXDIf5yZPws-VNa9cqNazsuT7CQ_XDI8rK0ffjdpIsfoSHOkaA1lJZ3uVMcI5Y3ki) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=3791148e780b4593bbcde1be2df5a17e&_e=rfoURImxCn7PQURrDUy19xLKF2PnxMSvM0v1m-mZWZZ8M3963xS40pskRmZ4NZzW8Zgls14rNsme3Jscam2NYBKW0dPCs5P9xSImVoh8ZsD4vpDGf0jgVxfoQIxXoDwkDe8rgwzX2_pqOg6jlv15-Oq8pjzzb0fs8Hq_AEERPlbx4mmY0ndPvT-qBaAn1z0HX8oEgI9wxBMSncYrIKurzgwCW7zZXQuYiu7Uce7mL2ENa7VgDRFXkaK69h39izGRKjATu-qgerEpe46fpRfj2A%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=3791148e780b4593bbcde1be2df5a17e&_e=rfoURImxCn7PQURrDUy19w4YSNCqn8FMlmF7H-lULqquttSv_rUatij9mvMPzIGzHcFFLDmJUZO7nSfJfhKcMgIMdosekuGAwe_JthZRrEMj-v0ony2aSECk_fPEauHsynckv6sz2mdWh8HtTnKW9lmEukF9ecJaz5fka5KexPvo9gYBMbosbfCFK6dEicOBMMd90fiTiQ712c6nB1PcoPY1FpqX0ulofHAkH2Rhf58vW-PGaFRTJiW2ADb9AdRaQfxp3htUYu18SnOqOdb2dg%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=3791148e780b4593bbcde1be2df5a17e&_e=rfoURImxCn7PQURrDUy19_jLseltOxxA4q1-aH2OO91DuUCEHI87lmqCw8_h8rSHGLiFPq5zA1I3rQwXfu1-l1fiOJioh5TzWqvcLtMS5WTgnTuXcP3Px1POZq0BPNbcfvCWZyMy1TImipu_IBDnGSfoUkQkZsepo3VV6ndZf-M7HEnyFPjl2ODQHIApWO2ykV8bde1R-HXcqTx3pDPadOjrII0appDzj3ODnEpT21eyE5NEs8RC_8wsJ5ayr_seAVZvYGoctLQcZ2T8u_TJYw%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=3791148e780b4593bbcde1be2df5a17e&_e=rfoURImxCn7PQURrDUy1992Pfg0oaAUBPXKC_qjh8AIvunen1UQvgTUU93h6fe0fWC1siIpFxay3r9jx5VEn2TJkQXa6Lcl7x-CVNt2lq0LZa2UzqZUk06PwFLaY0TRXkf5J1oGu11q5TWnfyTha6zbqTFRhGzOn0dqEjRiE_29O00Fp4vWRGGWuJeZ-dIL6vp2kLy3wUhS876mEaMBPxOf83g1J14DOMf3cT4DqzLPM6Mcqe1S14waBpvpEU-HIDHWmNUHjxe3VZQsNaTCYkgAE8YX1Wha_QspJFsVJIrSq2FuzQBw5mNUPbu1AFNCN5eUW58-O5__yuDxdSVZga1kisD1AYxNqrgBjrcIrZHLQXMUVI95Qdga-td1w5ostrhNkQaasWC7jn66NRJaUFA%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=3791148e780b4593bbcde1be2df5a17e&_e=fi9gocnDRii1-WeiCQhwFlvhzOy93L7Vt-baJy6brT1vIELN5qemmcO__PXidh1GWFuRchAXbVMzQnOqrAFXUR6r_2qfT21xPyiYVfu3ysQDznqjOsNEko4bX_3QNUWSZy74WGbhiAtxCiunOkKHYoZ6ygkqQSyvmcT-7pBuhZQ7X0hD5J6dtXQ75dhnbeyIZMm3YqY9iogjQ452x_32aQ-qGpxNPtMuWc8wCqlBoPYd7cdJ-X-zZnBy9dNOGcHT) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=3791148e780b4593bbcde1be2df5a17e&_e=fi9gocnDRii1-WeiCQhwFlvhzOy93L7Vt-baJy6brT1vIELN5qemmcO__PXidh1GWFuRchAXbVMzQnOqrAFXUR6r_2qfT21xPyiYVfu3ysQDznqjOsNEko4bX_3QNUWSZy74WGbhiAtxCiunOkKHYoZ6ygkqQSyvmcT-7pBuhZQ7X0hD5J6dtXQ75dhnbeyIZMm3YqY9iogjQ452x_32aQ-qGpxNPtMuWc8wCqlBoPYd7cdJ-X-zZnBy9dNOGcHT) to unsubscribe.
