clean_body: It’s our first END OF QUARTER fundraising deadline since we won the Republican Party of Wisconsin endorsement at last month’s convention, and as of... Friend, we’re just 1 day away from one of the biggest tests our campaign has faced. It’s our first END OF QUARTER fundraising deadline since we won the Republican Party of Wisconsin endorsement at last month’s convention, and as of this email, we are just short of reaching our goal. We have $12,509 left to go. ** I'm just going to be honest with you. Democrats are outraising AND outspending us! According to recent reports in Politico, Democrats have spent over $7 million to re-elect Senator Baldwin and make Wisconsin a blue state again. They are spending money to buy this election and silence YOUR opinion! We HAVE to fight back! Please, friend, let’s show them we’re serious. Let’s exceed every expectation and close out this quarter with a huge bang. If you can chip in today, even just $25, it would be a big help in bringing our fight straight to Washington: Thank you, friend. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jim=20Banks?=
subject: The radical left doesn't belong in the Hoosier State
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Friend,

Democrats are moving further and further to the left, and their agenda is becoming even more radical. Their intentions to abolish ICE, open our borders, impeach President Trump, and use taxpayer dollars to fund abortions have been made perfectly clear.

[Will you please chip in today to help us reach our fundraising goal by tomorrow's deadline?](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=1653b43a8a&e=bfe3be83a5)
[](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=6b6203ab9b&e=bfe3be83a5)
**Our opponent is a Bernie Sanders liberal, and just like Barack Obama got her start in politics as a community organizer in Chicago. She is the most liberal candidate to ever run in our district, and belongs to the party who wants to put Nancy Pelosi back in the Speaker's chair.**

We need true conservatives in Congress who will fight for our Hoosier values and support President Trump's America First agenda. [Will you join us in this fight?](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=236e742374&e=bfe3be83a5)

Working for you,

Jim

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: RE: Important updates: Please read
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Abigail here!

I wanted to check in quickly and make sure you saw Dana's message earlier today. I second everything she said about how crucial your support has been -- without you, there's no way this race would be a toss-up. As I said on the night of our primary win: **Thank you, thank you, thank you.**

I also wanted to emphasize that where we stand with fundraising at the end of this quarter will shape so much of what we do going forward. The more resources we have, the more voters we can reach, so now's the perfect time to make a contribution.

Time is short, so **[here's a link that will take you directly to the page where you can make a donation, if you haven't already.](https://act.myngp.com/el/XZRoTUgz1foPr7lS_jtE_UWzO-67NrARL9R1VxfMZVA=/EO2cb4VY5rGT6onW5jNjH4zTIZetsCSIQE7pwJ30YJc=?refcode=062918abigail)**

Let's keep the momentum going!

-Abigail

\---------- Original message ----------
From: **Dana Bye**
Date: Friday, Jun 29, 2018
Subject: Important updates: Please read
To: Peter Willis < dpwillis67@gmail.com>

So much is happening, Peter, and I have a few especially important updates to share:

First, I'm not sure if you saw yesterday's message from Abigail, but Larry Sabato took another look in his renowned Crystal Ball and updated his rating for the 7th District from "Leans Republican" to "Toss-up." This is a really big deal, and the excitement around the office is at an all-time high. (Stop by and see for yourself!)

Another update: Endorsements continue to roll in. The League of Conservation Voters. The National Committee for an Effective Congress. And that's on top of earlier endorsements by organizations like Emily's List and End Citizens United. Please know that this is all the direct result of YOUR hard work. #TeamSpanberger has shown truly exceptional dedication, enthusiasm, and support, and more people than ever are taking notice.

Speaking of support, our critical end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is coming up tomorrow, and we're short $12,734 of our goal. [Will you contribute today to help us gain steam going into tomorrow's deadline?](https://act.myngp.com/el/XZRoTUgz1foPr7lS_jtE_UWzO-67NrARL9R1VxfMZVA=/EO2cb4VY5rGT6onW5jNjH4zTIZetsCSIQE7pwJ30YJc=?refcode=062918abigail)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/XZRoTUgz1foPr7lS_jtE_UWzO-67NrARL9R1VxfMZVA=/EO2cb4VY5rGT6onW5jNjH4zTIZetsCSIQE7pwJ30YJc=?refcode=062918abigail)
We're making tremendous strides in our effort to flip the 7th District, and I can't thank you enough for all you're doing. With precious few hours left in June, let's send a message around the District and the nation: We're committed, and we can win.

\- Dana Bye
_Campaign Manager, Spanberger for Congress_

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/XZRoTUgz1foPr7lS_jtE_UWzO-67NrARL9R1VxfMZVA=/t-a0wiGF2r8IaLmcp6MHLJoX_Zkz48bkRU5MNeh9cYA=)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/XZRoTUgz1foPr7lS_jtE_UWzO-67NrARL9R1VxfMZVA=/Z2ce7O0wGEdyObRkg4S0UWBLAtGjiOcnrquESnjtzM8=)_

Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/XZRoTUgz1foPr7lS_jtE_UWzO-67NrARL9R1VxfMZVA=/wJcRMipOZcQ4y3k0W8UdPSfsJ4Cbw5IA-DxuJ5capQc=).

name: Brad Elkins
subject: Following up from yesterday
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | Hey, following up on my email from yesterday. Below is the latest update on where we stand in our push to respond to the latest Koch brothers' ads against us.

Read more about how our rapid response is going below, or **[contribute right now so we can close our new budget gap before Saturday's FEC deadline.](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q2?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+contribute+right+now+so+we+can+close+our&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_2_6&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_2_6&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_2_6")**

* * *

When I learned the Koch brothers launched ads against Martin in New Mexico, I knew we had to scrap our old budget and come up with a completely new plan.

If we're going to go toe to toe with the Kochs, we need to rapidly grow our grassroots organizing, expand our advertising spending, and hire more staff.

**It 's been a scramble to get everything in place, but it's worth it. And with your support I know we can bridge the gap.**

[DONATE $10 NOW >>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q2?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+ask+NOW+gtgt&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_2_6&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_2_6&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_2_6")
This has been a difficult month for everyone, especially after the news we will soon have a massive fight on our hands over the next Supreme Court nominee. But it reminded me how critical it is we keep Martin in the Senate working for us. Martin is committed to making progress wherever he can on the issues facing New Mexicans, whether it's health care, immigration, protecting public lands, or stopping extreme judicial nominees that would roll back rights.

**If we lose Martin in the Senate, we 'll lose a leader who fights for us. After looking at the president's latest tweets and the recent Supreme Court news, it's clear we need senators like Martin more than ever.**

Meeting our new budget goal will go a long way toward helping us combat the latest Koch ads and lay the groundwork for victory in November. I just finished meeting with Steve to go over our latest numbers, and if everyone receiving this email contributed right now, we'd be in the clear for the rest of the month.

****_[You can contribute to our campaign here and help us close our new budget gap before our FEC deadline midnight tomorrow.](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q2?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=11+-+You+can+contribute+to+our+campaign+here+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_2_6&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_2_6&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_2_6")_****

_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ ****
****[Donate $10 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q2?express_lane=true&amount=10amp;firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=12+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_2_6&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_2_6&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_2_6")**** ****[Donate $27 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q2?express_lane=true&amount=50&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=14+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_2_6&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_2_6&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_2_6")****** ****[Donate another amount](http://nm.martinheinrich. name: Joe Donnelly
subject: not a copy machine for any president
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
While Republican Rep. Mike Braun thinks Indiana's senator should serve as a personal copy machine for President Trump, my perspective on the job is very different. |
---

| | **_[Donate toward our $40,000 end-of-quarter finance report goal and have your donation DOUBLE MATCHED>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e17/7377f838/3d0d9986/51f9cdb6/4175487376/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eoq-doublematch?refcode=20180629.2nd&amount=10")_** Peter,

While Republican Rep. Mike Braun thinks Indiana's senator should serve as a personal copy machine for President Trump, my perspective on the job is very different. As Hoosiers' hired help in the Senate, it's my responsibility to fight for the interests of working and middle-class families -- **and that means putting Indiana 's interests before those of any president.**

But the national Republicans and their far-right special interest groups don't like that. They'd much rather have a copy machine for their extreme agenda, which is why Mitch McConnell's super PAC and Karl Rove's slush fund are pouring so much money into Indiana to try and defeat me. And that's not to mention all the ultra-wealthy donors we're expecting to see when my GOP opponent Rep. Braun makes his campaign finance report public in a couple weeks.

**Now, they may have a few very rich donors, but I 've got supporters like you who care about doing what's right instead of lining your own pockets.** And since the next fundraising report will be used to judge the strength of our campaign, I really need your help to make sure we meet our $40,000 online goal. **Will you rush a contribution to help us finish the quarter strong and beat Republican Rep. Mike Braun? Remember, all donations before the deadline are double matched!** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dr.=20Paul=20Gosar?=
subject: Tomorrow at Midnight...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Gosar for Congress
body:
There's just 36 hours left until the June 30th FEC deadline | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3d5f02ed9afa/tomorrow-at-midnight?e=7ca82c1e3d)
---
| |
---
| |
###
Good afternoon,

Saturday, June 30th, at midnight, the FEC requires me to file my quarterly fundraising report - [and I need your help! ](https://gosar4congress.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d959b13e61e10f809478ff16&id=e47bc57f6b&e=7ca82c1e3d)

This is our last opportunity to show the opposition the strong support I have throughout District 4.

I've drawn several Left Wing opponents who want to take me out of office but your contributions fuel our efforts on the ground, on the airwaves, and online - and beat them back.

Can I [count on your support](https://gosar4congress.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d959b13e61e10f809478ff16&id=0d0e5703a0&e=7ca82c1e3d) to help me continue the fight? Will you [make a donation](https://gosar4congress.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d959b13e61e10f809478ff16&id=951f4a6b41&e=7ca82c1e3d) to our cause today?

The Mainstream Media and Liberal Special Interests are on the attack against conservative leaders because they want a go-along-to-get-along candidate. However,I will continue to focus on issues important to our district: border security, the growth of government, lower taxes, and protecting our Constitution.

Thank you for your continued support for my re-election as your voice in Washington!
---
|
---
|
### Dr. Paul Gosar
Member of Congress
Arizona's 4th District
---

clean_body: | | | "" FIRST: Voters rejected Joe Arpaio at the polls. As sheriff of Maricopa County, he lost re-election by nearly 13 points in 2016. THEN: Arpaio was convicted of criminal contempt for racially discriminatory policing, only to be pardoned by President Trump. NOW: Arpaio is running for U.S. Senate and claiming he lost in 2016 because the race was "rigged" against him...by the Obama administration. "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" Sheriff Joe is calling on Jeff Sessions to investigate the Obama-era DOJ for "rigging the sheriff's race" against him -- just in time to rile up his donors before tomorrow's critical end-of-quarter deadline. name: Bob Casey
subject: Kamala and I want to meet you in Philadelphia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e61cd/51dbcc2a/1b1f256c/3a4d8aa/4167049502/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")

Team -- I wanted to make sure you saw Kamala's note from last week.

Kamala knows what it takes to build a grassroots base of supporters like you, and how you can help make all the difference this November. That's why we've decided to invite one lucky winner and their a guest to fly out to Philadelphia to see us -- to say thank you for everything you've done for this campaign so far.

**_[We want you to join us! Chip in just $5 or whatever you can and you'll be automatically entered to win.](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/meet-kamala-harris-bc4s?refcode=em_20180629_fr3_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks,

Bob \---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Kamala Harris
Date: June 20, 2018

Hi there,

When I was elected to the Senate in 2016, it was because grassroots supporters just like you committed their time, energy and resources to make it happen. I'll be forever grateful for that.

Now my friend Bob is up for re-election, and I know how much that same support means to him. It has allowed him to hire staff, put ads on the air and start to build an organizing program that will turn out the vote in November. Now Bob wants to say thank you to his supporters, and I'm happy to help him do it.

**_[I'm coming to Philadelphia next month, and Bob's campaign will fly one lucky winner and a guest out to join us -- just chip in $5 or whatever you can to be automatically entered to win.](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/meet-kamala-harris-bc4s?refcode=em_20180629_fr3_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

It's so important to give Bob our full support this year, team. He's been a firewall against the most dangerous pieces of the Trump agenda, standing up for middle-class families, affordable health care and our democracy itself. Bob is fighting for us, and I'm proud to stand next to him in Pennsylvania next month.

**Join me and Bob in Philadelphia, and let us say thank you in person:**

**_[secure.bobcasey.com/contest](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/meet-kamala-harris-bc4s?refcode=em_20180629_fr3_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks,

Kamala

Kamala Harris
U.S. Senator, California
[ENTER TO WIN](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/meet-kamala-harris-bc4s?refcode=em_20180629_fr3_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

| Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc.
---
PO Box 58746, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 19102

Contributions or gifts to Bob Casey for Senate are not tax deductible.
No purchase, payment, or contribution necessary to enter or win. Contributing will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by 06/30/18. Enter by contributing **[here](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e61cd/51dbcc2a/1b1f256c/3a4d8b5/4167049502/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/meet-kamala-harris-bc4s")** , or click **[here](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e61cd/51dbcc2a/1b1f256c/3a4d8b6/4167049502/VEsB/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/s/kamala-harris-contest-free-entry/")** to enter without contributing. One (1) winner will receive the following prize package: round-trip tickets for winner and one guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to Philadelphia, PA; one (1) night's hotel accommodations for winner and one guest; attendance at either a women's lunch or reception with Senator Harris on Friday, July 13, 2018; ground transportation to and from the airport at the Destination and ground transportation to and from either a women's lunch or reception with Senator Harris; Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Approx. value of prize package: $3,500. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). Promotion subject to **[Official Rules](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e61cd/51dbcc2a/1b1f256c/3a4d8b7/4167049502/VEsO/ "https://bobcasey.com/harris-contest-rules/")** and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Bob Casey for Senate Inc., P.O. Box 58746, Philadelphia, PA 19102.
This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**
If that is not your preferred email address, you can update your information [here.](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e61cd/51dbcc2a/1b1f256c/3a4d8b0/4167049502/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/s/update-your-contact-information?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") We believe emails are an important way to stay in contact with supporters, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e61cd/51dbcc2a/1b1f256c/3a4d8b1/4167049502/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/s/update-your-preferences?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Bob Casey for Senate appreciates any feedback you might have. [Click here](mailto:info@bobcasey.com?Subject=Feedback) to contact Bob Casey for Senate with any questions, concerns, or ideas. Want to stay updated on the campaign through social media? You can like Bob Casey for Senate on [Facebook](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e61cd/51dbcc2a/1b1f256c/3a4d8b2/4167049502/VEsHBA/ "https://www.facebook.com/BobCaseyJr/") or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e61cd/51dbcc2a/1b1f256c/3a4d8b3/4167049502/VEsHBw/ "https://twitter.com/Bob_Casey") or [Instagram](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e61cd/51dbcc2a/1b1f256c/3a4d8bc/4167049502/VEsHBg/ "https://www.instagram.com/bobcaseyjr/"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e61cd/51dbcc2a/1b1f256c/3a4d8bd/4167049502/VEsHAQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") from Bob Casey for Senate emails.

name: Emily Cain, EMILY's List
subject: Be a part of history >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c41e5/24c69fd9/19053e549/18834caf/1020241911/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFER46N_digital_email_20180629_SuppRec1stDonation_inact&source=WQEFER46N_digital_email_20180629_SuppRec1stDonation_inact")
---

Peter,

When you make your first donation to EMILY's List, you become a part of history.

From helping the first Democratic woman get elected to the Senate in her own right to electing the first black woman senator, the first openly gay congresswoman, the first women combat veterans in Congress, the first Asian American woman senator, _and supporting the first woman to be a presidential nominee of a major political party_ -- this community has a lot to be proud of.

But we're not done yet. There's plenty of history to make this year, and you'll want to say you were a part of it.
**[Make your first donation to help reach our $400,000 End-of-Quarter goal and help elect history-making pro-choice Democratic women.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c41e5/24c69fd9/19053e549/18834bfb/1020241911/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180626_email_JuneEOQ?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+Make+your+first+donation+to+help+reach+o&utm_campaign=WQEFER46N_digital_email_20180629_SuppRec1stDonation_inact&source=WQEFER46N_digital_email_20180629_SuppRec1stDonation_inact")**
A donation today could help elect a record number of pro-choice Democratic women up and down the ballot and across the country -- from the first Latinas from Texas and the first Native American women to serve in Congress to the first black woman governor in the nation.

A donation today could help take back control of state legislative chambers, grow the number of pro-choice Democratic women governors up from only two, and flip the House and Senate.

And a donation today will help train the next generation of women leaders.

Are you ready to make history, Peter?

**Donate $3 to help reach our $400,000 End-of-Quarter goal and help elect more pro-choice Democratic women in November:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Reach-June-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c41e5/24c69fd9/19053e549/18834cab/1020241911/VEsD/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180626_email_JuneEOQ?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgReachJuneGoal&utm_campaign=WQEFER46N_digital_email_20180629_SuppRec1stDonation_inact&source=WQEFER46N_digital_email_20180629_SuppRec1stDonation_inact")**

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c41e5/24c69fd9/19053e549/18834ca4/1020241911/VEsA/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180626_email_JuneEOQ?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=WQEFER46N_digital_email_20180629_SuppRec1stDonation_inact&source=WQEFER46N_digital_email_20180629_SuppRec1stDonation_inact")

\---
If you've donated recently, with a different email address, or offline, thank you! These records may not reflect those additional contributions, but don't worry, we have it recorded.

name: Tori Taylor
subject: Covering ground (Deadline approaching)
disclaimer_text: paid for by Washington special interests and the extreme flank of his party's leadership
body:
|
---

| | | | _Kathy Manning is a proud advocate for the families of North Carolina. To her, the cause of making health care more affordable and accessible isn't political -- it's personal. She relies on your contributions to be elected._ | | [Donate](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427812/e3b7d3/5c8c2838/2555e178/412139559/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180629pm?refcode=kme180629pm_m")
---
As a campaign manager, I have to say -- I couldn't be more proud of this team and the work we've done, thus far.
We are all over the district knocking on doors, talking to people, registering voters, and getting Kathy's important message out there.
Polling shows this is a tight race. North Carolinians here at home know that Ted Budd is bought and paid for by Washington special interests and the extreme flank of his party's leadership. They're ready for a change. They're ready for a tireless champion for North Carolina families like Kathy. And if we keep pushing, we can send her to Congress.
[**The end of this month is another milestone in the race -- the end of the FEC fundraising quarter. We need to raise $50,000 to keep all our efforts going strong. But we only have another 29 hours. Can you give?**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427812/e3b7d3/5c8c2838/2555e178/412139559/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180629pm?refcode=kme180629pm_m")
These goals are important -- this one more than most.
It's our first fundraising quarter of the general election. Our fundraising numbers for the quarter will be public. If we knock this $50,000 goal out of the park, everyone will see we're energized and continuing to build the momentum to win. Everyone will know Kathy is ready to fight for North Carolina.
If we come up short, everyone will know that too. The Washington special interests will see weakness and pounce. And of course by pounce, I mean spend even more money to attack Kathy and prop up their best bud, Ted.
Let's crush this goal with room to spare! [**Rush in your contribution before Saturday's deadline.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427812/e3b7d3/5c8c2838/2555e178/412139559/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180629pm?refcode=kme180629pm_m")

Tori Taylor

| | Did you see Senator Harris's message yet? Two words can sum up how I felt after reading it: **Fired. Up.** Sherrod's lead is shrinking in the latest polls. Vice President Mike Pence just came to Ohio to attack Sherrod -- like Trump has done several times before. If we want to keep Sherrod in the U.S. Senate, we need to step up. If you're ready to take action, use this link to give $5 or more & help us reach our first FEC goal of the general election: [**https://www.sherrodbrown.com/eoq2**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff984/4462dc26/5690b485/2007a81d/1357623100/VEsH/ "https://www.sherrodbrown.com/eoq2") -Kimberly Sent from my iPhone _\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Kamala Harris
Subject: A Trump-endorsed registered lobbyist_ |
---
Hey again, team --
I know I've been sending you a lot of fundraising messages lately and honestly that's because the fight to win back Congress is at a serious tipping point right now. **Today I 'm going to ask you to support my colleague Sherrod Brown in his re-election campaign.** I hope you'll give me a quick moment to explain why he needs your help this week.
Here's why you should support Sherrod Brown today:
* I can tell you from firsthand experience that **no elected official in Congress has been a more reliable leader against this Administration 's agenda and Wall Street greed and abuse than Sherrod Brown.** That's why special interest groups have spent so much to defeat him.

* **Sherrod 's opponent is a Trump-endorsed registered lobbyist** who failed to disclose $50,000 in campaign contributions a few years ago. If he wins, **he 'll rubberstamp the worst of the White House's agenda:** from eliminating protections for pre-existing conditions to their anti-immigrant agenda.

* Finally -- and I know you hear me say this a lot -- we cannot take back Congress if we lose Sherrod. **Trump won Ohio by nine points just a few years ago and Republicans think they can do it again in 2018.** Proving them wrong is critical to building a Democratic majority in the U.S. Senate.

**Your donation of $10 or more could be the difference between victory or defeat for Sherrod Brown. A lot hinges on this election in Ohio -- pitch in right now, if you can afford it:**

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: most important goal yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
I have some good news and some bad:
After a poll came out showing us trailing GOP Sen. Dean Heller by one point here in Nevada, _POLITICO_ said, "Democrats have almost no shot at winning back the Senate majority if Jacky Rosen can't defeat Sen. Dean Heller in the fall."
That's why this latest news from my team is so incredible: A generous group of donors has offered to match ****[every dollar donated before our critical end-of-quarter FEC deadline](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd6ff/4fbb2af3/7d926173/5e8bc11f/3249851322/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azg3Mi1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-match?refcode=jtk872-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**** to help us close the gap and hit our $75,000 goal. ****[(Click here to push us over the top, help us win in NV to flip the Senate blue, and protect the future of the Supreme Court.)](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd6ff/4fbb2af3/7d926173/5e8bc11f/3249851322/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azg3Mi1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-match?refcode=jtk872-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****

In a race this close, every gift could be the difference between winning or losing - between flipping the Senate blue or handing Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell another two years of GOP control and the power to decide the future of the Supreme Court. The GOP is going all in to win in Nevada and save its Senate majority, so we can't afford to lose momentum now. **A Mitch McConnell-linked Super PAC is even spending $11.2 _million_ against us.**
**Please, I need every single grassroots supporter who cares about standing up to the GOP and taking back the Senate majority to step up _today_ , before it's too late. **[Please, give $5 and have every dollar DOUBLED to help us win in Nevada so we can take back the Senate and protect the future of the Supreme Court.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd6ff/4fbb2af3/7d926173/5e8bc11f/3249851322/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azg3Mi1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-match?refcode=jtk872-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****
